title: Legal Assistant / Paralegal – Remote, U.S. Law Firm (Full-Time)
description:
Legal Assistant / Paralegal – Remote, U.S. Law Firm (Full-Time)



Work Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Time (U.S.)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Position Type: Full-Time



We are a busy U.S.-based law firm seeking a Legal Assistant / Paralegal who can also handle receptionist duties. This position requires strong organizational skills, excellent written and spoken English, and the ability to support attorneys with substantive legal work while managing client communications and scheduling.



This role is best suited for someone who is highly detail-oriented, professional on the phone, and capable of managing multiple responsibilities in a fast-paced legal environment.



Requirements (Mandatory – No Exceptions)



Applicants must meet ALL of the following requirements:



Fluent spoken and written English with a clear American accent

Strong grammar and writing proficiency

Must be a licensed Filipino lawyer or hold a Juris Doctor (JD) degree

Prior law firm or legal support experience

Experience using Microsoft Office (Word, Outlook, Excel)

Familiarity with legal practice management software such as

Clio,

MyCase, or

Lawmatics

Ability to work independently and manage competing deadlines

Technical Requirements

Computer with at least 16GB RAM

Stable internet connection (minimum 100 Mbps download speed) with backup internet access in case of outages

USB headset with clear microphone

Quiet, distraction-free home office

Availability to work 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Time (U.S.)



Applicants who do not meet these requirements will not be considered.



Responsibilities

Receptionist Duties

Answer and direct incoming calls professionally

Respond promptly to online inquiries and form submissions

Schedule consultations and meetings for attorneys

Update CRM with accurate lead and client information

Legal Assistant / Paralegal Duties

Draft, proofread, and format legal documents, pleadings, discovery requests/responses, contracts, and correspondence under attorney supervision

Organize, index, and maintain case files (physical and electronic)

Conduct factual and legal research using online databases and public records

Prepare exhibits, trial binders, and hearing materials

Track and manage court deadlines, hearings, and filing requirements to ensure compliance

File legal documents with courts via e-filing systems

Summarize depositions, discovery responses, and other legal documents for attorney review

Assist in preparing immigration, family law, or civil litigation case packets as assigned

Manage billing entries, timesheets, and expense records

Important Application Instructions



Interested applicants must send a Google Drive link containing the following:



Your updated resume

A 1–2 minute video recording introducing yourself, demonstrating your spoken English, and explaining why you are a good fit for the role (upload the file to Google Drive and set to “Anyone with the link can view”)

A short written paragraph (3–5 sentences) explaining your relevant experience



Important:

Include the codeword “milo47” in your
 subject line or in the first sentence of your application so we know you read the full job post.



Applications that do not include all required materials will not be considered.

title: Webdesigner (Figma)
description:

The role is project-based initially, with the possibility of transitioning into a long-term or full-time collaboration. We usually work with German clients for our projects.



Responsibilities

- Design modern websites in Figma based on provided branding and copywriting

- Create desktop and mobile layouts

- Develop 2 homepage design concepts and iterate based on feedback

- Design the remaining pages after homepage approval

- Prepare final files for development

- Work with components, variables, and design systems in Figma

- Document progress and collaborate with the team in ClickUp and Slack

- You will not communicate with clients directly — feedback will be handled through a dedicated team contact.



Requirements

- Strong Figma skills (components, variables, responsive layouts)

- Solid understanding of design principles (visual hierarchy, spacing, typography, contrast)

- Ability to create modern, clean, and conversion-focused designs

- Structured and organized workflow

- Minimum 2 years of web design experience

- Portfolio with modern service-based website designs



Bonus

- UX design experience

- Understanding of conversion-focused / marketing-driven design

- Skills in graphic design or branding

- We are looking for someone with a strong eye for design, who quickly notices inconsistencies and cares about creating high-quality work.



Next Step

If your profile is a good fit, the next step will be a short introductory call with our founder to get to know each other and discuss the collaboration.

title: Media Manager Wanted! Scale Meta & Google Ads for Clothing  Brands
description:
-MUST INCLUDE SCREENSHOTS OF META DASHBOARD PERFORMANCE FEATURING ROAS, CPA, CTR

This role is responsible for the full lifecycle of paid campaigns — strategy, implementation, optimization, reporting, and scaling. You will primarily manage campaigns on Meta 
/Instagram) and LinkedIn, while experience with other platforms such as Google Ads, TikTok, and YouTube is a plus.



We’re hiring a performance operator to support daily execution across Meta and Google Ads. This role is focused on precise implementation, not strategy. You will be responsible for campaign setup, budget adjustments, audience structuring, and basic optimization within clearly defined rules. You must be comfortable pulling and reporting on key metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, AOV, MER), maintaining clean tracking sheets, and delivering concise, data-focused updates without being prompted. Familiarity with Shopify and Klaviyo is required to monitor conversion flow, support
 coordination, and flag any issues that impact performance. You will also support creative testing workflows by organizing assets, tracking test variables, and identifying early winners based on data.



Execution discipline is critical. You are expected to follow instructions exactly, use consistent naming conventions, document all changes made inside ad accounts, and operate within strict scale/kill logic. This is an asynchronous role that requires strong self-management, fast turnaround times, and the ability to proactively identify problems such as tracking errors, inefficient spend, or funnel breaks. Communication should be clear, direct, and focused on actionable insights.



This is not a strategy role. You will be executing within an established system. The priority is reliability, accuracy, and speed—ensuring clean operations and contributing to profitable scaling.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



• Develop paid media strategies for multiple brands

• Launch and manage campaigns on Meta and LinkedIn Ads

• Allocate budgets and manage spend across campaigns

• Optimize campaigns for conversions, CPL, ROAS, and other performance metrics

• Analyze campaign performance and generate insights

• Build and maintain clear performance reporting dashboards

 -Campaign Management

 Set up and structure campaigns (CBO, ABO, retargeting)

 Ensure tracking accuracy (pixel, events, attribution)

-Scaling & Budget

 Allocate spend based on performance

 Scale winners, cut losers quickly

-Optimization

 Improve CPA / CAC, ROAS, CTR, CPC

 Run structured A/B tests

 Operate using clear decision rules





What We Provide

• Ad accounts + budget ready

• Existing product line + brand direction

• Shopify store + tools

• Clear structure with autonomy

• Long-term growth opportunity



Compensation

• Base salary

• Performance-based commission (discussed on call)

title: Shopify Customer Support CSR
description:
The role is for a CSR position, responding to 30+ client enquiries per day via
, Instagram and Meta for an automotive company. 



Here's a longer summary:



We’re a proudly Australian-made automotive brand with a strong reputation for quality and customer experience. We design and manufacture locally, ship worldwide, and continue to grow!



We’re looking for a Customer Experience Lead to be the voice of our brand across
 and social platforms. This is a forward-facing, high-impact role for someone who enjoys connecting with people, helping them get excited about our product, and representing a growing brand with energy and professionalism.



You won’t just be answering tickets, you’ll be helping potential and existing customers when questions arise, guiding them so they can get the most out of our product, and making sure they have experiences that excite them to try it and really enjoy using it. If you love helping people in this way and take pride in representing a growing brand, this role is for you!



Responsibilities:



• Own customer communication across
 and social media, creating a positive and engaging experience



• Manage refunds, disputes, chargebacks, and warranty cases



• Improve and expand our Help Scout knowledge base



• Diagnose and resolve more complex customer issues when they arise



• Identify and track recurring patterns in customer questions, product issues, and opportunities to improve



• Build SOPs for support workflows



• Improve customer education to reduce incoming ticket volume



• Manage Instagram/Facebook DMs and comments



• Post on our socials and interact with the community



• Eventually help hire, train and manage offshore or junior support staff



You Are:



• Friendly, positive, and confident

• Excellent written communicator (native-level English)

• Experienced in ecommerce (Shopify)

• Comfortable being the public voice of a brand

• Curious and enjoys learning the product in depth

• Strong problem-solving skills and able to handle more complex support scenarios or difficult customers

• Excited to grow with a scaling brand and take ownership of customer experience



Nice to Have:

• Help Scout experience

• Automotive Interest / enthusiast



Growth Opportunity



This is a long-term role starting part-time with strong potential to expand as the brand grows. You’ll become a core part of shaping the customer experience and public presence of the brand.







You will be asked to answer the following questions when submitting a proposal:



Why does this role excite you?



Have you managed social media for a brand?



What ecommerce tools/platforms have you worked with?



Describe your recent experience with similar projects



What is your current availability in hours/week?

description:

This role starts project based... paid per website with increments as progress is shown. As client volume grows and performance is proven, part-time and full-time work becomes available.

I am an experienced business owner, I ran a real estate business for 5 years with a 4 person VA team. If hired full time I am easy to work with, understanding with schedules, and give routine pay raises based on performance.

Position details:

Must have reasonably fast internet connection

Other jobs permitted before transitioning to full time

Project based at first, transition to full time



Requirements:

Proficient in English reading and writing

Proven GoHighLevel experience - website builder is non-negotiable



Only applications with examples of GHL websites or GHL work will be considered. Please include your favorite color in the subject line to filter automated applications.

title: Graphic Designer — eCommerce Website & Marketing Graphics
description:
About Us

GroundingWell is a $100M revenue eCommerce company selling grounding and earthing health products (bedsheets, mats, shoes) to customers worldwide. We’re a remote team spanning Australia, the USA, Canada, and the Philippines.



What You’ll Do

• Design and iterate on eCommerce website layouts in Figma

• Create marketing graphics, infographics, and visual assets for ads and landing pages

• Simplify complex concepts into clean, visually compelling graphics

• Proactively suggest creative ideas for new graphics and design improvements



Requirements

• Proficient in Figma (required)

• Experience designing website layouts for eCommerce

• Extreme attention to detail

• Ability to communicate design ideas clearly (verbally and visually)

• Available to work at least 8 hours per day between 8 AM and 8 PM AEST



Why Work With Us

We pay above-market rates and offer generous bonuses for creative ideas that perform well in our marketing. We’re a direct-response advertising company, which means the effectiveness of your creative work is directly measurable by its profitability when used as paid advertising on social media. Great designers earn significantly more in performance bonuses than their base salary. Your graphics will be used across all advertising channels across the entire business. If you’re someone who constantly generates ideas and wants to be recognised and paid for it, this is the role for you.



How to Apply

Send your portfolio (or 3–5 samples of your best work) and a brief message about why you’re interested. Shortlisted candidates will be sent a short application form and then invited to a quick 5–10 minute video call.

title: Remote Patient Concierge & Social Media Coordinator
description:
Elevate Aesthetics  | Remote | Full-Time 





About Elevate Aesthetics



Elevate Aesthetics y is a premier aesthetics center which also provides education and training organization dedicated to empowering med spa professionals with the skills, knowledge, and systems needed to build thriving, high-performing practices. We are growing — and we're looking for a polished, organized, and proactive individual to join our remote team.



---



**Position Overview**



As our Remote Patient Concierge & Social Media Coordinator, you will serve as the first point of contact for prospective and current clients. You will manage inbound calls, coordinate appointment scheduling, and respond to inquiries across our social media platforms — ensuring every interaction reflects the professionalism and excellence that defines the Elevate brand.





**Key Responsibilities**



- Answer inbound calls promptly and professionally, representing the Elevate Aesthetics Academy brand with warmth and expertise

- Schedule, confirm, and follow up on appointments using our practice management software

- Respond to direct messages, comments, and inquiries across Instagram,
, and other social platforms in a timely and brand-aligned manner

- Qualify leads and route high-priority inquiries to the appropriate tea
mber

- Maintain accurate records of client communications and appointment activity

- Support basic administrative tasks as needed



**Requirements & Qualifications**



- Minimum 2 years of experience in a customer service, medical receptionist, or administrative role

- Experience in a med spa, aesthetics, healthcare, or wellness environment strongly preferred

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills

- Proficiency with scheduling software and CRM tools

- Comfortable managing multiple social media platforms simultaneously

- Highly organized, self-motivated, and able to work independently in a remote setting

- Professional demeanor with a strong attention to detail

- Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, dedicated workspace





**Perks & Benefits**



- 100% remote position — work from anywhere

- Supportive, growth-oriented team culture

- Opportunity to grow within an expanding organization in the aesthetics industry





SEND WHATSAPP MESSAGE TO

title: Amazon Sourcing Specialist (Private Label)
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented Amazon Sourcing Specialist to help identify reliable manufacturers and support product development for our Amazon business.



This role focuses primarily on supplier sourcing and validation, while also supporting product research and operational tasks. The right person should be able to work independently, stay organized, and think critically, while also collaborating with leadership when needed.



This role has strong growth potential and may evolve into an Associate Manager or Manager position as the business expands.



Role Focus



70% Supplier Sourcing

20% Product Research

10% Operational Support



Key Responsibilities

Supplier Sourcing (Primary Focus)



Research manufacturers on Alibaba and other sourcing platforms



Evaluate suppliers based on credibility, pricing, MOQ, lead times, and communication



Create supplier comparison sheets and shortlist reliable manufacturers



Coordinate sample requests and supplier communication



Product Research Support



Analyze demand, competition, pricing, and margins



Identify opportunities for product differentiation



Provide simple data-backed insights to support product decisions



Operational Support



Organize sourcing databases and research sheets



Track supplier communication and updates



Assist with product development tasks when needed





REQUIREMENTS:



Experience in Amazon product sourcing, product research, or supplier coordination



Strong attention to detail and organization



Ability to work independently and manage tasks without constant supervision



Comfortable using tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, and Google Sheets



To help us understand how you think, please briefly mention one factor you consider most important when evaluating a supplier when submitting your application. Write your answer in the first sentence.





Compensation



Starting rate: $7–$8/hour



We believe in fair compensation and rewarding tea
mbers who consistently bring value, take ownership, and contribute to the company’s growth. Compensation can increase over time as responsibilities and impact grow.





Important



Please do not apply if you:



are not motivated to grow



require constant step-by-step instruction to complete tasks



are not comfortable working independently



We are looking for individuals who have a growth mindset, take initiative, and are excited to learn and improve over time.





Growth Opportunity



This role is designed to grow with the company. Strong performers may transition into:



Associate Manager



Sourcing Manager



Product Development Manager



as the business expands.

title: Outbound Sales/Cold Caller B2B

 marketing campaigns using Zoho

, and messaging platforms

Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written)

Familiarity with
 campaigns and social media management

title: Real Estate Lead Manager
description:
We are looking for a full-time Real Estate Lead Manager. This is a long-term role built for people who can handle pressure, show up daily, and perform at a high level. We want people who strive for excellence. This position will not be for everyone. We have built a sales-driven environment with daily meetings, regular rewards, clear expectations, and consistent standards with our KPI’s. You will be challenged to improve your communication, sales ability, and discipline. We do not grow if you do not grow. Join us if you’re ready to really go to the next level.



Key Responsibilities:



Cold Calling:

Making outbound calls daily from company provided, specific lists. 



Lead Qualification:

Identifying motivated sellers timeline, motivation, and controlling the conversation.



Appointment Setting:

Setting appointments with qualified leads, adding them to our appointments channel and passing them to the acquisitions team through our system.



Compensation:



We’re offering a competitive salary based on your time. We also offer many opportunities for bonuses and rewards based on your performance. Your efforts NEVER go unnoticed. If you work hard you will be a star at this company. 



What we require:



At least 1 year of real estate experience

Strong time management skills 

Attendance and preparation for daily tea
etings

Access to a PayPal account

Reliable internet and professional work environment

Self-discipline 

Availability Monday - Friday, 7:30 AM - 3:30 PM CST



How to apply:



If you’re ready to make a real impact in the Real Estate industry, and join our team of All-Stars. Please submit your resume and Microsoft Teams
, along with a short recording introducing yourself and sharing why you’d be a perfect fit for this role.

title: Graphic & Multimedia Designer for E-commerce (Amazon)
description:
Join Our Growing Design Team at Roots & Branches!



Hi there! We’re looking for a graphic designer, someone who stands out, not just anyone. We need someone who understands e-commerce platforms, especially Amazon. And knows that design isn’t just about looking good, it’s about driving sales.



We already have a strong designers in our team, leading brand books and full-scale creative direction. What we're missing now is a versatile, hands-on designer who can turn ideas into assets that convert across platforms like Amazon, Bol, and our own webshops.



What You'll Be Doing

You'll be part of a small but ambitious team that creates all content for our brands, ranging from:

- E-commerce Visuals to different marketplaces

- Brand Ecommerce Page, Storefronts

- Cross-platform creatives for campaigns

- Concept development and execution for digital visuals

- Short-form videos, product explainers, infographic-style edits

- Work closely with our Lead Designer on campaigns, product launches, and creative refreshes

- Collaborate with our lead designer to execute full campaigns, new product launches, and content refreshes.





What We're Looking For:



Tech Skills

- Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects & Premiere Pro)

- Proficiency in Figma (Figma Design & FigJam)

- Experience with graphic design for e-commerce, especially Amazon listings & A+ Content

- Video editing skills are a must (focus on short infographic videos & video ads)

- Basic understanding of UI/UX and bonus points for HTML & CSS

- Open to working with AI tools (for creativity & efficiency)



Soft Skills

- Creativity paired with commercial thinking — you don’t just design, you design to sell.

- Strong communication & collaboration skills.

- Ability to juggle multiple projects — digital, video — without losing quality.

- Eye for composition, layout, typography and product photography.

- Flexible and fast — e-commerce waits for no one.



Non-Negotiable

- Strong portfolio showcasing e-commerce & other digital graphic design work

(We won’t move forward without seeing past Amazon and/or online retail-related work.)

- Experience working with EU or US brands

- Experience with A/B testing of creatives

- Worked for an e-commerce aggregator, agency, or brand-focused environment



What We Offer

- Competitive freelancer salary from 800 to 1300 USD depending on experience + 13th month performance-based bonus.

- Full-time, fully remote role (Philippines-based applicants preferred)

- Creative freedom, personal responsibility, and a role where you can actually make an impact

- 40-hour work week

- Health insurance & pension funds (5000 PHP extra per month)

- A fun, young international team that’s passionate about health, design, and growing online brands

- Direct collaboration with owners, marketers, and senior designers

- 25 holidays per year



About Roots & Branches

Roots & Branches is a European brand group focused on health & wellness products. We create & sell products under several brands through Amazon, our own webshops, and other platforms across Europe. We believe in making products that genuinely improve well-being - and you’ll help us make them look great and sell even better.



How to Apply

Please fill out this form:



Attention to detail test:

In question 7 of the form, mention the word Pineapple so we know you actually read this post. Applications without it will not be considered. All applicants should make a short introduction video where you tell a bit about yourself and why you would fit in our company based on your experience. No video is no submission.

title: Senior Risk & Compliance Consultant (Fintech & Crypto)
description:
We need an expert who bridges the gap between Web2 Traditional Finance (Fiat Rails) and Web3 On-chain Compliance.

Your core mission is not just to be a "blocker," but to "design safe mechanisms that enable business velocity." You will ensure we pass the rigorous onboarding requirements of our banking partners (e.g., Cybrid's AML program review) while managing the operational risks of a high-volume payment platform.



Key Responsibilities

Compliance Program Build-out

Draft BSA/AML Policies from Scratch: Create internal compliance policy documents (CIP, AML, OFAC) that meet US banking standards. This is a prerequisite for going live with partners like Cybrid.

Define KYC/KYB Standards: Design tiered identity verification workflows for our dual-track business (B2B Agency + B2C Palau ID). Define limits and requirements for Tier 1 vs. Tier 2 users.

Regulatory Strategy: Assess licensing requirements (MTL/MSB/MiCA) for US, Canada, and EU markets, providing a strategic roadmap for the next 12-24 months.

Operational Risk & Fraud Prevention

ACH Risk Management: specifically for ACH Pull scenarios. Design logic to mitigate NSF (Insufficient Funds) and Unauthorized Returns (e.g., balance checks via Plaid, settlement holding periods).

On-Chain Risk Integration: Configure on-chain analysis tools (e.g., GoPlus, Chainalysis, Elliptic) to define blocking rules for high-risk wallet addresses.

Transaction Monitoring: Set up velocity limits and alert rules for suspicious activities; handle Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) if necessary.

Partner Enablement

Due Diligence (DD): Represent the company in handling compliance inquiries from upstream banking partners and infrastructure providers (Cybrid, Hex Trust), assisting in completing complex DD questionnaires.

Vendor Assessment: Evaluate the compliance robustness of new payment rails (e.g., European SEPA, Asian local payouts).



Requirements

Experience: 5+ years of risk/compliance experience in Fintech or Crypto Exchanges. Must have hands-on experience with US Banking Rails (ACH/Wire).

Expertise:

Deep knowledge of FinCEN, OFAC sanctions, and AML workflows.

Strong understanding of the "FBO Account" model and the legal boundaries of a "Money Transmitter."

Understanding of stablecoin (USDC) minting and burning flows.

Tool Stack: Familiarity with industry-standard tools like Persona (Identity), Plaid (Bank Auth), and Chainalysis/TRM Labs (Crypto AML).

Mindset: Ability to balance "Compliance Requirements" with "User Experience." We don't need a bureaucrat; we need a builder who offers solutions.



Bonus Points

Certified Anti-Money Laundering Specialist (CAMS) certification.

Experience helping startups successfully onboard with Zero Hash, Cybrid, Circle, or Stripe.

Knowledge of RNS.ID (Palau Digital Residency) or similar sovereign identity projects.

Familiarity with India TDS tax regulations or Philippines cross-border remittance laws.

-Security and Compliance: Collaborate with the security team to implement and maintain security best practices. Conduct regular security assessments and ensure compliance with relevant regulations and standards.



-Monitoring and I
 Response: Set up and manage monitoring and alerting systems to proactively identify and address issues. Investigate and resolve infrastructure-related i
, conducting root cause analysis.

title: Photo Quality Specialist (Real Estate Media)
description:
It's this simple. For March this year we are going to hit 80 shoots for the month and every single one of those shoots has photos that need quality corrections done on them. That is the role we are hiring for.



On average it should only take about 30 mins per order and we pay $5 CAD (~$3.65 USD) per order. So this role is effectively $10 CAD (~$7.30 USD) per hour. This position requires you to complete all Quality Control on the photos by 9 am MST. Typically, the photos come back by 6 am MST. So that gives you a good 3 hour window to get the orders done. You need to be available during that time. If they come in sooner than you are free to work on it sooner but I need complete focus leading up to the 9 am MST deadline.



The ideal person will have exceptional attention to detail. You will be finding and fixing spots on the photos due to a dirty lens or sensor, removing Realtor signs and garbage cans from exterior photos, ensuring there are no reflections of the camera, tripod or photographer in the photos, adding drone address pins, and making sure there is a consistency between the photos that have already been edited. You will also be creating virtual twilights with a copy and paste AI text prompt.



If you want to be considered for this position you need to have GOOSE in your subject line of your application. If it is not there then you will automatically be filtered out and will not be considered for the position. This is part of that attention to detail I was talking about.



This position does require a subscription to the Adobe Creative Cloud. You will be using Lightroom Classic and Photoshop to accomplish your tasks. SOP tutorials will be provided on how to perform the job to a satisfactory level and there will be a test order for you to show that you do have attention to detail and can follow instruction.



We need someone who is able to communicate while they are working on these orders. Fluent English is a priority. Previous experience with Real Estate Photo Quality Assurance is a major asset. This is a fast paced industry and we have strict deadlines that we need to meet.

title: Experienced M365 CANVAS Apps Developer
description:
Hi,



I run a Perth-based IT consultancy, and we’re looking to bring a Mid/Senior-level developer into our growing Power Platform Development Team.



This role is ideal for someone who not only has strong technical skills, but also values the importance of user experience and intuitive interface design. We are building high-quality applications for market release, and UX/UI design is a critical part of our development process.



The successful applicant will have:

• 3+ years of experience with the Power Platform (Canvas Apps), Power BI, and Power Automate

• A proven track record in developing and architecting Canvas Apps with strong focus on usability and design consistency

• A user-centered approach to development, with a keen eye for interactive design and intuitive interfaces

• The ability to work independently and collaboratively as member of a team

• Excellent pral and written communication skills

• Experience in develop reports and dashboards using Quickcharts / PowerBI.

• Proven ability to build performant data models in SharePoint and Dataverse.





Ideally we are looking for full-time developers but will consider those who have at least 30 hours of availability per week and can work between 8am - 9pm Western Australian (Manilla) time. Hours can be worked flexibly within those timeframes.



The successful canddiate will have knowledge of:

• Deployment through Pipelines

• Use of Environment Variables

• Workflow automation via Power Automate

• Use of containers and layout controls for responsive and accessible UI design



Any experience of the following would also be advantageous but not essential

• Python

• API development

• JSON

• CSS



We are looking at building a number of new applications which we are looking to take to market. You will be joining a vibrant team, in a growing rapidly business with long-term prospects (this is not a random VA role).



To apply, please send your CV and a brief cover letter to me at

title: Long-Term General VA in E-Commerce
description:
Hi, I’m Kay. I’m looking for a full-time Operations/General Assistant for my e-commerce business. I run
 ads and manage a few Shopify stores. I started the business in 2024, and it has been steadily growing ever since; now, I'm looking to hire a few full-time positions. For this general assistant role, you will be working across the board in multiple key areas of the business. Training/SOPs will be provided.



Your Responsibilities:

- Answer customer support
s.

- Launch and manage ads in
 Ads Manager.

- Manage Shopify stores.

- Data entry for daily operations.

- Collaborate and communicate with tea
mbers.

- Communicate with suppliers and monitor fulfillment.

- Manage and oversee business tasks and the founder’s schedule.

- Other administrative tasks.



Tools that you might use:

- Shopify

-
 Ads Manager

- Slack

- Asana

- Zendesk

- Google Drive

- Google Sheets

- And more...



What We’re Looking For:

- Experience in Customer Support or Shopify (a big plus).

- Good communication skills.

- Learns quickly from SOPs and training.

- The ability to learn new skills and tools quickly.

- Strong attention to detail; organized and reliable.

- Proactive! Someone who doesn’t wait to be told what to do.

- Someone who thinks ahead and takes ownership of their work.



Other Information:

- Growth opportunities: more responsibility and higher pay as we scale.

- Great working hours: Daytime Philippines time.

- Monthly and annual performance bonuses available.

- We aim for a healthy, long-term relationship and hope you can grow alongside the business for a win-win situation.



---



TO APPLY:

- Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link.

- Your resume/portfolio.

- Your desired wage/salary and hours.

- Confirmation that you have a reliable computer/laptop and a stable internet connection.

- A short video recording answering these 5 questions (I know everyone’s time is precious, but a recording helps me get to know you better as a person!):

1. Do you have any experience related to Shopify,
 Ads, customer support, or dropshipping?

2. Are you currently working for someone? Tell me about your most recent job and why you quit.

3. Since you will be working across different areas of the business, can you talk about how you usually stay organized with work?

4. Where do you see yourself in 5 years?

5. What's your favorite hobby, and what do you usually do outside of work?

(You can use a Loom link, Google Drive, YouTube unlisted video, etc. Also, feel free to include anything else you’d like to say!)

title: B2B SDR – Outbound Lead Gen
description:
Business Development Associate (SDR) – Outbound Lead Gen (Part-Time)

Industry: Real Estate / Property Management

Temp Stay USA | Remote | 20 hrs/week to start| Start ASAP

Salary: TBD on Experience (Base salary plus+ bonus/spiff)



We are a short- and mid-term rental and property management company providing fully furnished housing solutions, serving insurance displacement providers, healthcare networks, and companies with temporary housing needs. Our mission is to create high-performing rentals through professional management, strategic partnerships, and outstanding guest experiences. 



We are looking for a B2B Sales Development Representative to help generate new business opportunities through outbound outreach. This role focuses on outreach to businesses to initiate conversations, build relationships, identify potential partnership opportunities, and qualify real housing needs. The goal is to develop conversations into qualified opportunities and coordinate follow-up discussions or solution presentations where there is a clear fit.



What you’ll be doing:

- Prospecting to businesses using tools like Apollo and LinkedIn

- Reaching out via calls,
, and LinkedIn messaging

- Identifying the right personas and job roles within target organizations and figuring out how to reach them effectively

- Building rapport and developing partner relationships through conversations

- Asking the right questions to qualify needs that match to our services / property solutions

- Booking meetings when qualified prospects have a clear partnering interest or immediate housing needs

- Following up consistently and managing many active conversations

- Logging activity and managing leads in CRM (HubSpot)



What this role is NOT:

- Not B2C (you are NOT selling to individual consumers)

- Not inbound support (this is outbound, proactive work)

- Not a scripted outbound volume machine

- Not customer service or support (this role is focused on generating new business) not upselling existing customers



What we’re looking for:

- Proven experience in B2B outbound sales, lead generation, or appointment setting (you must have experience prospecting   and reaching out to businesses—not consumers)

- Comfortable with cold outreach and building relationships from scratch

- Ability to identify the right personas within organizations and find effective ways to reach them

- Clear progression in sales or business development roles, showing growth in responsibility and skill over time

- Strong communication skills (spoken and written English)

- Organized, consistent, and persistent with follow-ups

- Comfortable working in a performance-driven, outbound role where results and consistency matter

- Takes ownership of their pipeline and proactively creates opportunities—doesn't "wait" for them



TO APPLY:

- Submit your Resume, contact info, and a short video outlining why you feel you will be a good fit for the job

title: Experienced U.S. S-Corp Accountant (QuickBooks Cleanup + 1120S Tax Filing) – One-Time Project
description:
This is a messy set of books and requires someone who understands real-world accounting — not just basic bookkeeping.



Scope of Work



Book Cleanup (Primary Task):



Review and clean up records in QuickBooks

Reclassify transactions correctly, including:

Shareholder loans vs. income

Owner distributions

Business expenses

Reconcile bank accounts and ensure accuracy

Organize deposits (including multiple cash deposits from owner loans)



Tax Preparation:



Prepare and complete Form 1120S

Prepare Schedule K-1 for 2 shareholders (50/50 ownership)

Handle final return (business is now closed)

Properly report:

Low profit (~$1,000 or less)

Distributions (~$19,000)

Shareholder loan (~$14,000 approx, partially repaid)

Sale of business asset (truck sold for ~$12,000)



Additional Requirements:



Ensure books and returns are IRS-compliant

Provide a brief explanation of the adjustments made

Be available for questions during the process

Required Experience (DO NOT APPLY WITHOUT THIS)

Proven experience with U.S. S-Corporations

Strong knowledge of:

Form 1120S

Schedule K-1

Shareholder distributions vs salary

Balance sheet cleanup

Advanced experience using QuickBooks

Experience fixing messy or incomplete books

Bonus (Preferred but Not Required):

Experience with transportation or trucking companies

Experience handling shareholder loans and asset sales

To Apply, Please Answer:

How many S-Corp (1120S) returns have you prepared?

Have you ever cleaned up messy QuickBooks books before? Explain briefly.

How would you handle shareholder loans vs income?

What is your expected price for this project?

Important Notes

This is a one-time project, but may lead to ongoing work

Must be detail-oriented and able to work independently

We are looking for someone who can start immediately



We are ready to hire ASAP for the right candidate.

title: Part-Time Executive Assistant to CEO (Operations & Finance Focus)
description:
Part-Time Executive Assistant to CEO (Operations & Finance Focus)

Reporting to: CEO & Operations Manager

Job Type: Part-Time (Around 10 - 15 hours/week, potential to grow to full-time)

Type of Employment: Contract / Remote

Pay: $4-$8 based on experience



????ABOUT XOXO Parents????

Join our remote team at XOXO Parents.

We are a fast-growing e-commerce company focused on creating products that make parenting easier and more enjoyable. Since 2018, we’ve grown rapidly across Amazon, Shopify, and other platforms, and we are entering our next phase of scale.

We are not a slow, corporate environment. We move fast, solve problems, and expect ownership. We’re building real systems behind a growing business, and we need someone who thrives in that environment.



We are a leader in our industry, with creative marketing and a fresh reputation. We value innovation, creativity, and culture in our business. We offer an exciting and vibrant work environment.



We are not for everyone. We have high standards, work hard, and hire smart people who can say “I don’t know - BUT I’ll find out!” If you are only interested in sick and vacation days, don’t apply. If you are ready for a fast and furious ride, with rewards like a positive culture, career training, and a bonus program, join us!





????ROLE????

This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role. If we zoom out, this role is best described as an Operations + Finance Administrative Assistant who lives inside the business systems and owns execution.



You will act as a right hand to the CEO by:

??Owning recurring financial and administrative cycles

??Supporting tax, compliance, and CPA-related workflows

??Managing QuickBooks, insurance, subscriptions, and documentation across entities

??Supporting e-commerce and operational linkages

??Managing calendar and
 across multiple accounts

??Taking on personal and family admin that mirrors business operations



This role exists so the CEO does not have to jump in to finish tasks, you will take ownership and drive them to completion.



????RESPONSIBILITIES????



Financial & Administrative Ownership

??Own recurring financial workflows (transactions, reconciliations, documentation)

??Maintain clean and accurate records across QuickBooks, Wave, and related systems

??Manage subscriptions, billing issues, refunds, and vendor accounts

??Organize and maintain financial documentation for banking, loans, and reporting

??Identify inefficiencies and improve administrative and financial processes



Calendar &
 Management (Multi-Account)

??Manage and maintain the CEO’s calendar across personal and business commitments

??Coordinate scheduling across multiple stakeholders, time zones, and priorities

??Proactively prioritize meetings, protect focus time, and resolve conflicts

??Manage multiple
 inboxes (business + personal), including:

??Sorting, prioritizing, and flagging key communications

??Drafting and responding to
s on behalf of the CEO

??Ensuring timely follow-ups and closing loops

??Create systems, filters, and workflows to keep inboxes organized and actionable

??Ensure the CEO only engages in high-priority communication



Tax & Compliance Support

??Track deadlines and maintain documentation for tax-related processes

??Support sales tax, licensing, and certification requirements

??Ensure compliance workflows are documented and consistently executed



Operations & Business Systems

??Maintain and improve operational workflows and internal systems

??Support certifications, registrations, and entity-related documentation

??Assist with inventory coordination, distributors, and operational logistics

??Ensure systems across tools and platforms remain clean and scalable



Executive & Personal Support

??Manage select personal and family administrative tasks for the CEO

??Coordinate appointments, documents, and key deadlines

??Support travel, benefits, and account management

??Reduce CEO involvement in administrative follow-up



Recurring & Governance Processes

??Own recurring financial and compliance cycles (monthly, quarterly, annual)

??Maintain documentation for tax plans 

??Track ongoing reporting and classification requirements

??Create and maintain SOPs for repeatable tasks



????RESULTS????

??Financial records are accurate, clean, and audit-ready

??Calendar is organized, optimized, and free of conflicts

???
 inboxes are controlled, prioritized, and not overwhelming

??Deadlines (tax, compliance, reporting) are never missed

??Recurring processes run without CEO involvement

??Systems are organized, documented, and scalable

??The CEO is freed from operational and administrative work



????REQUIREMENTS????

??3+ years in operations, executive assistant, or administrative roles

??Experience supporting a founder, small business owner, or e-commerce brand

??Experience managing calendar and inbox for an executive (required)

??Comfortable working across multiple entities (business + personal overlap)



Finance & Bookkeeping Skills

Hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online (required) and ideally Wave

??Transaction categorization and reconciliation

??Bank and credit card statement management

??Invoice tracking and application

??Experience preparing clean, organized documentation for a CPA

??Comfortable following and improving SOPs, checklists, and process documentation

??Creating system automation with AI and other tools



Tax, Compliance & Payroll Familiarity

??Sales tax processes (bonus: Colorado Revenue Online)

??Business licenses and certifications

??Payroll systems (Gusto or similar)

??Comfortable navigating US government, banking, and insurance portals



Tools & Systems

??Strong experience with project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, or similar)

??Highly proficient in Google Workspace (Drive, Sheets, Docs, Gmail)

??Strong experience with
 management tools, filters, and inbox organization



Familiarity with e-commerce tools is a plus:

??Amazon Seller Central, Shopify, Etsy

??Shipping/fulfillment tools (Veeqo or similar)

??Comfortable using AI tools, tutorials, and videos to solve problems independently



Operations & Communication Skills

??Confident communicating with banks, vendors, insurance providers, and agencies

??Able to resolve issues (billing, refunds, discrepancies) independently

??Strong written communication for internal, customer, and external interactions

??Able to coordinate across multiple stakeholders and systems



Personal Traits & Work Style

??Extremely detail-oriented (numbers, dates, documentation)

??Process-driven and organized

??Proactive and solution-oriented

??Discreet and trustworthy with sensitive information

??Comfortable balancing recurring structured work with one-off tasks

??Able to work independently without constant direction



????APPLYING FOR THE POSITION????

If you are interested in becoming a long-term tea
mber, please complete the following:

 ? Submit your resume

 ? Complete the application form: 

 ? Include the word EXPERT ADMIN in your subject line



? Final note  

This role is for someone who loves control, clarity, and clean systems across finances, inboxes, and operations. 

If you get a weird amount of satisfaction from:

 ? zero inbox chaos

 ? perfectly categorized transactions

 ? clean, repeatable processes

…you’re probably exactly who we’re looking for.

title: Digital Marketing Campaign Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



A growing Melbourne-based digital marketing agency is looking for a full-time Digital Marketing Campaign Manager to join their team remotely from the Philippines. This agency works with a diverse range of clients across multiple industries, delivering SEO, Google Ads, social media marketing, and digital strategy services.



You will own campaigns end-to-end — from strategy and planning through to execution, optimisation, and reporting. This is a hands-on management role suited to someone who knows the tools inside and out, thinks strategically about how to get results for clients, and takes full responsibility for campaign performance.



This is a long-term, stable position with genuine growth potential. The agency is building out its marketing capability and the right person will have the opportunity to grow into a team leader or coordinator role over time.



---



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



Campaign Strategy, Execution and Management (Core)

• Own and manage integrated digital marketing campaigns across SEO, Google Ads, and social media (paid and organic, including
, Instagram, and LinkedIn)

• Conduct competitor analysis and identify opportunities for client campaigns

• Build and manage content calendars and campaign schedules

• Set up, monitor, and optimise Google Ads campaigns including keyword research, ad copy, audience targeting, and bid management

• Implement and manage SEO strategies including technical audits, backlink building, and on-page optimisation

• Manage social media accounts including organic posting, community engagement, and paid campaign execution

• Track campaign performance end-to-end and adjust strategies based on data



Reporting and Analytics

• Build and maintain custom client reports using Google Data Studio (Looker Studio)

• Prepare monthly performance reports covering ROI, traffic, conversions, audience growth, and campaign metrics

• Use Google Analytics (GA4), Google Tag Manager, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and similar tools to inform strategy and measure results

• Present clear, data-driven recommendations to the team



Client Support

• Participate in discovery calls and client meetings alongside senior tea
mbers

• Help prepare strategy presentations and campaign proposals for new and existing clients

• Communicate campaign progress, insights, and recommendations clearly in writing and in meetings



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Essential

• Minimum 3 years of hands-on digital marketing experience, preferably in an agency environment managing multiple client accounts

• Proven ability to plan, execute, and manage campaigns across SEO, Google Ads, and social media (paid and organic)

• Strong working knowledge of: Google Ads, Google Analytics (GA4), Google Tag Manager, Google Data Studio (Looker Studio), SEMrush or Ahrefs,
/Meta Ads Manager, Hootsuite or similar scheduling tools

• Experience conducting competitor analysis and translating findings into actionable campaign strategies

• Ability to build campaign plans that clearly explain the strategy, rationale, channels, and expected outcomes

• Strong written English — you will be writing reports, proposals, and campaign copy

• Self-motivated and able to work independently without constant supervision

• Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, professional home workspace



Desirable (Good to Have)

• Experience writing marketing copy — taglines, calls to action, ad copy, social media captions

• Familiarity with WordPress for blog posting and basic content updates

• Experience with Canva or similar design tools for creating social media graphics

• Exposure to
 marketing platforms and campaign execution

• Understanding of Meta advertising compliance (including 18+ ad categories)

• Ability to contribute to client-facing meetings and present strategy confidently

• Graphic design skills (the agency has a design team, so this is a bonus not a requirement)

• Sales or business development experience (the agency handles client acquisition, so this is supplementary)



---



ATTITUDE AND ATTRIBUTES



• Self-starter: You do not wait to be told what to do. You identify what needs to happen and you do it

• Campaign thinker: You understand how channels work together and can build a strategy that makes sense across SEO, paid, and social

• Detail-oriented: You catch errors in data, spot trends others miss, and take pride in accurate reporting

• Clear communicator: You can explain a campaign strategy to a non-technical audience in plain language

• Curious and current: You stay across platform changes, algorithm updates, and industry trends

• Growth-minded: You want to develop your skills, take on more responsibility, and grow within the team



---



WORK ENVIRONMENT



• Full-time remote position (Monday to Friday)

• Work hours aligned to Melbourne, Australia business hours

• Communication via
, chat, and video calls

• Regular interaction with the agency director and existing marketing team

• You will be working across multiple client accounts simultaneously



---



WHAT WE OFFER



• Competitive salary

• Long-term, stable full-time role with a growing agency

• Genuine opportunity to grow into a team coordinator or leadership role

• Diverse client portfolio — exposure to multiple industries and campaign types

• Supportive team environment that values initiative, skill, and results



---



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered for this role, your application must include all of the following. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be progressed.



1. Your resume (PDF format preferred) and folio of sample work

2. A brief introduction (3-5 sentences): Tell us who you are, where you are based, and why this role interests you.

3. Campaign experience summary (1 paragraph): Describe a digital marketing campaign you planned and executed. What was the objective, which channels did you use, and what were the results?

4. Tools proficiency: List the marketing tools and platforms you use regularly and rate your proficiency in each (beginner / intermediate / advanced). Include at minimum: Google Ads, Google Analytics, a social media management tool, and a reporting tool.

5. Your work setup: Please provide a photo of your workspace, a screenshot of your internet speed test (use speedtest.net), and your computer specifications (screenshot or typed).

6. Availability: Confirm that you are available for full-time work (38-40 hours per week) aligned to Melbourne business hours and that this would be your sole employment.

7. Answer these questions:

   - How many years have you been working in digital marketing?

   - Have you worked for an Australian or international client before? If yes, briefly describe the arrangement.

   - What is your current living situation? (e.g., Do you live alone, with family, support dependents?)

   - What does a stable, long-term role mean to you personally?

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Job Application: 



READ BELOW BEFORE SUBMITTING..



Ever dreamt of being the wizard behind the curtain—the one who keeps the leads flowing and turns interest into action? If so, we’re looking for you. Grabbing Market Media is searching for a dedicated, full-time Internal Sales Associate to manage, call, and convert warm homeowner leads into appointments for our contractor clients.

Picture this: It’s 10:07 PM on a Wednesday. Our team leader is hard at work, watching the leads pile up from our high-performing ads. Homeowners are waiting for calls, databases need updating, and every “no” is a challenge to turn into a “yes.” Our fast-paced, online marketing business is booming, and we need someone who’s ready to dive in, take charge, and transform these leads into booked appointments.





Can You Be the Solution?





If you thrive under pressure, excel at client communications, and have a knack for converting leads, you may be the exceptional Internal Sales Associate we need. Here’s what we’re looking for:

Thrives under pressure: You're a pro at phone interactions and handle shifting priorities with ease.

Ultra-productive: You’re so efficient your last employer considered hiring two people to replace you.

Empathetic listener: You read between the lines and understand homeowners’ needs, guiding conversations skillfully.

CRM expert: Fast typing skills and attention to detail keep our systems current and effective.





Benefits:

Growth opportunities with the potential for increased hours and pay

Work from wherever

Paid Time Off and Holidays Off

Room to advance into management roles

Join a top 5 marketing company in the home improvement industry with a supportive, international team





Job Overview:

This part-time, remote role that can grow into full-time - this requires dedication during these hours:

Mandatory

4-6 hours per day

Monday through Friday

Preferred/Optional

Saturday: 10AM - 2PM EST

Sunday: 10AM - 2PM EST





Main Responsibilities:

Manage 5-10 client accounts to qualify and book in-home appointments.

Call and text leads every day, all day

Work old leads with free time, handle promotional blasts, incoming texts, and
s, and Follow-ups

Respond to incoming texts and
s to maximize appointment bookings





Requirements:

Experience setting appointments for a home improvement company or agency that helps remodeling companies - specifically, remodeling companies that do bathroom or kitchen remodels

Fluent English (and Fluent Spanish Preferred) - level B2 English or better

Go Highlevel Experience

2+ years of Appointment Setting or Sales Experience (Preferred: currently working as an appointment setter, looking for a better opportunity)

Dual Monitor Working Setup

Strong Wi-Fi connection and a stable computer with a microphone

Quiet workspace

Hard-working/resilient, self-efficient, and able to work the hours listed above

Excellent communication and active listening skills, high emotional IQ

Bonus: experience with the construction industry (specifically kitchen and bath remodeling)





Compensation:

On Target Earnings of $600-800+ USD per month while working part-time

Base Pay + Commission (Uncapped)





If you’re ready to turn leads into revenue and contribute to our client’s success, apply today! Whether you're a seasoned pro or have been out of work for a while, we want to hear from you.





Job Application:

title: Residential HVAC Reactivation Setter (High Volume – Appointment Setter)
description:
Residential Reactivation Setter (High Volume – Appointment Setter)



Read this first

This is not a “VA job.”

This is a production role.

If you are:

• Slow 

• Passive 

• Or waiting for instructions 

Do not apply.

If you:

• Speak excellent English 

• Can handle high call volume 

• And want to be paid based on performance 

Keep reading.



What this role is

You are responsible for one thing:

Turning past customers and old leads into booked appointments

That’s it.

No selling.

No long explanations.

No admin work.

Just:

• Call 

• Connect 

• Book 



What you’ll actually do

• Call past customers (we already did work for them) 

• Call old estimates that never closed 

• Send SMS follow-ups 

• Book appointments directly into our calendar 

You will be working through:

• Warm lists 

• Known customers 

• Existing opportunities 

This is not cold calling strangers.



Daily expectations

• 250 outbound calls per day and
s

• 20–40 conversations per day 

• 8–15 appointments booked per day 



If you are not hitting these numbers:

Something is wrong, and we will fix it fast.



What winning looks like

• Your calendar is full every day 

• Leads respond to you quickly 

• You handle objections smoothly 

• You follow up until they book 

• You move fast and stay consistent 



What you’ll say (simple and proven)

You are not “selling HVAC.”

You are offering:

• Free system checkups 

• Priority service 

• Follow-up on past work 

Your job is to create interest and book the call



Core values

Clear Communication

You speak clearly, confidently, and professionally.

Relentless Consistency

You show up every day and hit your numbers.

Confident Ownership

You don’t wait. You take action and get results.



Compensation

We pay for performance.

Base:

$6.50–$8/hour (depending on experience)



Performance Bonus

• Per appointment booked 

• Additional bonus for: 

o Showed appointments 

o Closed jobs 



Top performers will earn significantly more than base.



What we provide

• Dialing system 

• Scripts (proven and simple) 

• Booking system + Tracking spreadsheets 

• Training and feedback 



Requirements

• Fluent English (clear, confident, natural) 

• Strong phone presence 

• Comfortable with high call volume 

• Fast learner 

• Reliable internet + quiet workspace 



This role is NOT for you if

• You don’t like being on the phone 

• You struggle with English communication 

• You need constant supervision 

• You avoid rejection 

• You don’t follow instructions 



Schedule

• Full-time 

• Aligned with U.S. business hours 8am-5pm PST Monday-Friday

• Consistent daily output expected 



Final note

Most people want “easy work.”

This is not that.

This is:

High volume

High performance

High opportunity

If you are fast, focused, and consistent, you will win here.



How to Apply (Read Carefully This Is Part of the Job)



We do not hire based on resumes alone.



We hire based on:

Communication

Speed

Execution



If you want to stand out, follow these steps exactly:

Step 1: Submit a Voice Recording (Required)

Record a 30–60 second voice message answering this:

“Hi, this is [your name] with Evergreen State Heating & A/C.

We worked with you in the past and wanted to follow up to offer a quick system check and priority service.

Would you like to get something scheduled this week?”



What we are listening for:



Clear, confident English

Natural tone (not robotic)

Professional delivery



Step 2: Show Us Your Output



In your application, include:



How many calls per day you have handled

Your best results (appointments booked, conversions, etc.)

Any experience with:

Appointment setting

Cold or warm calling

CRM systems



Be specific.



“I worked as a VA” is not enough.



Step 3: Tell Us Why You’ll Win Here



Answer this in 2–3 sentences:



“Why would you be one of the top performers in this role?”



We are looking for:



Confidence

Ownership

Work ethic

How to Stand Out (Most People Won’t Do This)



If you want to move to the top of the list:



1. Send a short video (optional, but powerful)



Introduce yourself and show your communication skills.



2. Demonstrate follow-up



After applying, send a follow-up message:



Reconfirm your interest

Reiterate why you’re a strong fit



This shows you can do the job.



3. Show speed



Complete the application quickly and correctly.



This role requires action, not hesitation.

title: Amazon Operations & Customer Support (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Important: We ONLY review applications submitted via the link below. Applications sent through OnlineJobs.ph (or messages) will not be considered. 



Please copy/paste this into your browser to apply for the job:



++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++



We’re hiring a structured, reliable, and proactive Amazon Virtual Assistant (Part-Time) to support day-to-day Amazon operations for Belfort Music (US & EU).



You’ll help keep our Seller Central accounts clean and healthy, support customer service via Zendesk, maintain listings through flat files, and improve documentation and SOPs. This role is ideal for someone who loves systems, accuracy, and continuous improvement — and who uses AI tools to work faster and smarter.



Responsibilities



As a part-time Amazon Virtual Assistant, you will play a crucial role in executing our brand strategies. Your responsibilities include:



Amazon Account Operations

 • Monitor Amazon Seller Central (Account Health, Performance Notifications, Policy Alerts)

 • Open, manage, and follow up on Seller Support cases

 • Identify suppressed, stranded, inactive, or broken listings and escalate clearly



Customer Support

 • Manage and respond to customer inquiries via Zendesk

 • Troubleshoot order, delivery, and product-related issues

 • Use AI tools to draft clear, accurate, and on-brand responses

 • Apply proper tagging, internal notes, and escalations

 • Coordinate Zendesk tickets with Seller Central cases when needed



Listings & Catalog Management

 • Create and update listings using flat files (inventory templates)

 • Build and maintain parent–child variation groupings

 • Update listing content (titles, bullets, descriptions, backend fields)

 • Upload and maintain:

 • Listing images

 • A+ Content

 • Brand Storefront modules

 • Use AI tools to assist with:

 • Content formatting and consistency

 • Error checking and bulk update preparation

 • SOP alignment and validation

 • Improve process efficiency wherever possible



Reporting, Tools & Admin Support

 • Work confidently in Excel / Google Sheets, including:

 • VLOOKUP / XLOOKUP

 • IF / IFS

 • SUMIF / COUNTIF

 • Basic data cleanup and validation

 • Update weekly and monthly operational reports

 • Use ClickUp to manage tasks, statuses, priorities, and documentation

 • Maintain clean, organized file structures in Google Drive



SOPs, Documentation & Systems

 • Follow existing SOPs, checklists, and workflows

 • Create and update SOPs when processes change or improve

 • Document workflows with clear steps, screenshots, and examples

 • Flag gaps, inefficiencies, or outdated documentation

 • Use AI (e.g., ChatGPT) to:

 • Draft SOP outlines

 • Improve clarity and structure

 • Summarize or standardize processes



Qualifications



To succeed in this role, you should bring a combination of experience, structure, and a growth-oriented mindset.



Must-Have Qualifications

 • 1–2+ years experience as an Amazon Virtual Assistant

 • Strong experience with Amazon Seller Central

 • Zendesk (or similar CRM tool) experience for customer support

 • Strong working knowledge of Excel / Google Sheets formulas

 • Experience using flat files for new listing creation and bulk updates

 • Proven experience managing parent–child variation structures

 • Experience uploading and updating:

 • Listing images

 • A+ Content

 • Brand Storefronts

 • Experience creating and maintaining SOPs / process documentation

 • Familiarity or hands-on experience with ClickUp (or similar project management tool)

 • Frequent and practical use of AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT) to improve efficiency

 • Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable



Mindset & Work Ethic

 • Proactive problem solver: You don’t wait to be told — you flag issues early and suggest clear solutions.

 • Strong sense of ownership: You take responsibility from start to finish and ensure nothing is left undone.

 • Exceptional organizational skills: You naturally structure work, set priorities, and keep projects on track.

 • Customer-centric mindset: You handle communication with clarity and empathy.

 • Collaborative communicator: You keep others in the loop, give helpful updates, and contribute to a healthy team culture.





Work Schedule & Compensation

 • Hours: 10–20 hours per week

 • Schedule: Flexible, with some overlap during PH business hours (with timetracker)

 • Long-term role with growth opportunities



To confirm you applied via the link above and read the full listing, include the word “cheesecake” in your screening answers on 



We only review applications submitted via this link: 





Benefits

 • Remote job with flexibility during main office hours in the Philippines

 • Continuous professional development through new strategies, masterclasses, and masterminds

 • Be part of a dynamic team focused on growth and learning

 • Attractive compensation





Not a good fit if…



This role requires structure, initiative, and clear communication. It’s probably not for you if:

 • You need constant reminders to stay on top of tasks

 • You complete work without checking the result

 • You struggle to manage multiple priorities in a self-organized way

 • You find it difficult to communicate clearly, proactively, and with a positive tone

 • You ignore existing SOPs and try to reinvent workflows without first aligning with how the team currently operates

 • You avoid feedback or see it as criticism rather than a tool for growth





If this sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

Join us and help shape the future of our brand with clarity, structure, and purpose.

title: SEO / AEO / AIO Specialist
description:
Schedule: Flexible — manage your own time. Must be available for weekly strategy calls during US business hours and respond to messages within 24 hours on weekdays.



About Us

We are a growing digital marketing agency working with service-based business clients. We’re looking for a skilled SEO specialist who also understands Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and AI Optimization (AIO) to help our clients dominate search rankings and AI-generated results. This is an output-based role — we don’t track hours, we track results. If you eat, sleep, and breathe search engine rankings — we want to talk to you.



What You’ll Do

• Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and full technical SEO audits for client websites

• Develop and execute on-page and off-page SEO strategies to achieve page 1 and #1 rankings on Google

• Optimize content for AI-powered search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) — this is AEO/AIO

• Implement schema markup, structured data, and featured snippet optimization

• Plan and coordinate content strategies with our content writer to produce SEO-optimized blog posts, landing pages, and pillar content

• Build and manage a link-building strategy including outreach, guest posting, and digital PR

• Provide monthly SEO reports with clear KPIs: rankings, organic traffic, conversions, and backlink growth

• Stay current with Google algorithm updates, AI search trends, and emerging SEO best practices

 

Requirements

• Minimum 2–3 years of hands-on SEO experience with proven ranking results — you MUST provide a portfolio with case studies

• REQUIRED: Past experience working with service-based businesses (e.g. law firms, dental/medical practices, HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, real estate, cleaning services, roofing, contractors, salons, or similar local service providers)

• Portfolio must include: before/after ranking screenshots, traffic growth data, and the specific strategies you used to achieve results for service-based clients

• Strong understanding of local SEO: Google Business Profile optimization, local pack rankings, citation building, and geo-targeted keyword strategies

• Strong understanding of technical SEO: site speed, crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals

• Experience with SEO tools: Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, Google Analytics

• Knowledge of AEO/AIO concepts — optimizing for AI-generated answers and featured snippets

• Experience with link building and outreach campaigns

• Excellent written English — you’ll be creating SEO briefs, reports, and communicating strategy

• Self-motivated and able to work independently without constant supervision

• Bonus: Experience with WordPress, Shopify, or other CMS platforms

 

How to Apply

Send your application with the subject line “SEO Specialist Application – [Your Name]”. You MUST include: (1) Your resume, (2) A portfolio or case study document showing SEO results you achieved for service-based business clients — include screenshots of rankings, traffic growth, and the strategies used, (3) Links to service-based business websites you’ve worked on. Applications without a portfolio showing service-based business experience will NOT be considered. Do not apply if you only have e-commerce or affiliate SEO experience.

title: Video Editor
description:
Who we are: 



OP Digital Solutions is an Australian-based digital marketing and content agency entering our 10th year in business. We work with corporate clients across industries including golf, food & hospitality, and professional services — delivering content that's sharp, strategic, and built to perform. We're a fast-paced, high-performance team that holds ourselves to a high standard and expects the same from everyone we bring on board.



About the Role: 



We're looking for a talented, experienced Video Editor to join our team full-time. This is a remote role based in the Philippines, working closely with our team to produce high-quality, fast-paced video content for corporate clients across industries including golf, food & hospitality, and corporate brand content. If you're someone who lives and breathes short-form video, has a sharp eye for pacing and storytelling, and can hit the ground running — we want to hear from you.



What You'll Be Doing



- Editing fast-paced reels and short-form content for Instagram,
, TikTok, and LinkedIn

- Working with raw footage to produce polished, publish-ready videos that suit Australian corporate clients

- Colour grading, audio syncing, motion graphics, and caption/subtitle integration

- Managing multiple projects simultaneously and meeting tight deadlines

- Communicating clearly with our team on revisions, timelines, and creative direction

- Maintaining consistency with each client's brand guidelines and tone



What We're Looking For (Must-Haves)



- Proven experience editing reels and short-form social media content — corporate, golf, or food content experience is a strong advantage

- Proficient in DaVinci Resolve (or highly skilled in Premiere Pro/Final Cut with a genuine willingness to learn DaVinci Resolve)
