- Strong understanding of Australian culture, humour, and communication style

- A fast, reliable internet connection (the faster the better — please include your speed in your application)

- Your own Mac setup, ideally with multiple screens

- Ability to work full-time (40 hours/week) and be available during Australian business hours (or overlap)



You'll Stand Out If You:



- Have a portfolio that shows range — different industries, different styles, all high quality

- Can demonstrate fast turnaround without sacrificing quality

- Understand social media trends and know what makes content stop the scroll

- Are proactive, self-directed, and don't need to be micromanaged



Equipment Requirements:



- Mac computer (required)

- Multiple monitors (preferred)

- Fast, stable internet connection (please include your Speedtest result with your application)

- Quality headphones or speakers for audio editing



Compensation & Setup:



- PHP 80,000 – 100,000 per month (based on experience)

- Full-time, 40 hours/week

- Long-term role with growth opportunity

- Collaborative, creative team environment





How to Apply



To be considered, your application must include:



- A link to your portfolio — show us your best reels and short-form edits (YouTube, Vimeo, Google Drive, or similar)

- A brief introduction — who you are, your experience, and why you're the right fit

- Your internet speed — include a screenshot or link from 
 or speedtest.net

- Your current equipment setup — Mac model, screen setup, editing specs

- Your availability and whether you can work Australian business hours



?? Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



We're not just looking for someone to fill a seat — we're looking for someone who takes pride in their craft and wants to grow with us. If that's you, apply now.

title: SEO Content Writer & Link Builder
description:
Schedule: Flexible — manage your own time. Must be available for weekly check-ins during US business hours and respond to messages within 24 hours on weekdays.



About Us

We are a digital marketing agency helping service-based business clients rank #1 on Google and build authority in their industries. We need a talented content writer who can produce high-quality, SEO-optimized content AND handle link-building outreach. This is an output-based role — we don’t track hours, we track deliverables. Perfect for someone who loves writing and also enjoys the hustle of outreach and relationship building.



What You’ll Do

Content Writing (60%):

• Write SEO-optimized blog posts, articles, landing pages, and pillar content based on keyword briefs provided by our SEO lead

• Write content formatted for AI search engines — clear, structured, and designed to appear in featured snippets and AI-generated answers

• Research topics thoroughly and produce engaging, well-organized content that ranks AND converts readers

• Optimize existing content with updated keywords, better structure, and improved readability

• Produce 8–12 high-quality articles per month (1,500–3,000 words each)

Link Building (40%):

• Conduct outreach to bloggers, website owners, and editors for guest posting and backlink opportunities

• Write guest post pitches and guest articles for placement on relevant, high-authority websites

• Build and manage a database of outreach contacts and track link placements

• Identify link-building opportunities through competitor backlink analysis

• Secure 10–20 quality backlinks per month from DA 30+ websites

 

Requirements

• Minimum 1–2 years of experience writing SEO content — you MUST send writing samples

• REQUIRED: Past experience writing content for service-based businesses (e.g. law firms, medical/dental practices, home services, contractors, real estate agents, salons, cleaning companies, or similar). Show us the content you’ve written for these types of clients

• Portfolio must include: links to published blog posts, landing pages, or articles you wrote for service-based business websites

• Strong command of written English — grammar, clarity, and engaging style

• Understanding of how service-based businesses attract local customers through content (service pages, location pages, FAQ content, “near me” optimization)

• Basic understanding of on-page SEO: keywords, headers, meta descriptions, internal linking

• Experience with outreach and link building is a big plus (or willingness to learn fast)

• Familiarity with tools like Google Docs, WordPress, Ahrefs or SEMrush (for keyword/backlink research)

• Highly organized — you’ll be managing content calendars and outreach spreadsheets simultaneously

• Reliable, meets deadlines, and communicates proactively when issues arise

• Bonus: Experience writing for specific service niches (legal, medical, home services, financial services)

 

How to Apply

Send your application with the subject line “Content Writer & Link Builder – [Your Name]”. You MUST include: (1) Your resume, (2) 2–3 writing samples from service-based business clients (blog posts, service pages, or landing pages), (3) Links to live published content you’ve written for service-based businesses, (4) A short paragraph explaining your experience writing for service industries. Applications without a portfolio of service-based business content will NOT be considered.

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer
description:
YOUTUBE THUMBNAIL DESIGNER (Part-Time Retainer)



Edwards Media Ventures LLC is hiring a Thumbnail Designer for our YouTube channels. This is a part-time, remote retainer position.



We produce finance, political commentary, and lifestyle/social news content across multiple channels. Our production workflow is organized and systematic. You will not be guessing what to make. Every thumbnail request comes with the video title, topic context, and creative direction.



You can review our channels here:







Study our current thumbnails before applying. If your work cannot match or improve upon our existing style, this is not the right fit.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Design high-performing YouTube thumbnails across two channels (with potential expansion to a third)

- Work from provided templates to maintain brand consistency across each channel's distinct visual style

- Deliver thumbnails within 24 hours of receiving assets (same-day when needed)

- Respond to revision requests (typically 1-2 rounds) with fast turnaround

- Study our existing thumbnails and maintain visual consistency



EXPECTED VOLUME



- 15-25 thumbnails per month across two channels

- Potential expansion to a third channel, bringing total volume to 50+ thumbnails per month

- Additional volume beyond the base retainer will be compensated separately



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Advanced Adobe Photoshop skills (cutouts, lighting adjustments, color grading, compositing)

- Experience designing YouTube thumbnails specifically (not just general graphic design)

- Understanding of what drives high CTR: visual hierarchy, emotional intensity, contrast, readability at mobile sizes

- Ability to follow templates and creative direction precisely while still bringing creative energy

- Reliable, responsive communication

- Comfortable learning new tools and workflows



COMPENSATION



- $
USD per month retainer (based on experience and portfolio strength)

- 1-2 revision rounds per thumbnail included

- Performance bonuses tied to CTR improvement over channel baselines

- Retainer increases are performance-based and reviewed after the assessment period

- Volume increases to the third channel come with a proportional pay increase



30-DAY ASSESSMENT PERIOD



All new hires begin with a 30-day assessment where we evaluate thumbnail quality, turnaround speed, ability to follow creative direction, and communication. Long-term fit and growth opportunities are discussed after this period.



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (Read Carefully)

Your Forex knowledge plays an important role in building trust, providing accurate information, and helping clients make informed decisions.

mbers who want to develop their skills and grow with us as the company continues to expand.

title: Full-Time Magento Developer – Be Part of Something, Not Just a Contractor
description:
???? FULL-TIME MAGENTO DEVELOPER – Become a Core Part of Our Team



???? Salary: $700 – $1,200/month depending on experience (we pay for the right person)



?? PLEASE READ FULLY BEFORE APPLYING. This is not a freelance gig. This is a career.



---



We are a growing eCommerce company with a heavily customized Magento store looking for a rockstar developer who doesn't just write code — they THINK like a business owner. We want someone who digs deep into our products, understands our customers, and proactively solves problems.



We'll give you direction and vision. We won't hold your hand. You take it from there.



If you need to be told what to do every step of the way, this is NOT the role for you. If you get excited about finding smarter solutions, automating processes, and making an online store perform at its absolute best — keep reading.



---



???? WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:



• Own our Magento store end-to-end — you are the developer, the problem solver, and the strategist

• Get deep into our products and business so you understand what we need before we ask

• Proactively identify and implement the right extensions, tools, or custom builds

• Research, evaluate, and integrate AI-powered tools to improve store performance and customer experience

• Automate business processes — from order management to marketing workflows to inventory alerts — using tools like Zapier, Make, or similar

• Keep up with Magento updates, security patches, and best practices without being reminded

• Shopify knowledge is a strong plus — we may expand there



---



? YOU ARE THE RIGHT FIT IF:



• You have 3+ years of hands-on Magento 2 development on live, real stores

• You've worked with heavily customized Magento environments

• You know how to find and evaluate third-party extensions — and know when to build instead

• You are actively using AI tools (ChatGPT, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, etc.) in your daily work

• You understand automation platforms like Zapier, Make (Integromat), or n8n

• You take initiative — you spot problems and fix them before being asked

• You communicate clearly and proactively — no ghosting, no excuses

• You want a long-term home where your work actually matters



---



? DO NOT APPLY IF:



• You need a detailed task list every day

• You're juggling multiple clients and treating this as a side project

• You haven't worked on a real eCommerce store with real customers

• You're not actively keeping up with AI and new tech



---



???? WHAT WE OFFER:



• Full-time, long-term position — we're not here to waste your time

• $700 – $1,200/month based on your experience and skills

• A real seat at the table — your ideas and input are valued

• A company that grows with you and rewards loyalty

• Stable, consistent work with room to take on more responsibility



---



???? HOW TO APPLY:



Do NOT send a generic application. It will be ignored.



To be considered, send us ALL of the following:



1. A short video (2–3 minutes) — introduce yourself and walk us through a Magento project you're proud of

2. Live URLs of Magento stores you've worked on

3. What AI tools are you currently using and how do you use them day-to-day?

4. Describe an automation you built that saved a business real time or money

title: Electrical Estimating Analyst
description:
Position Summary

The Electrical Estimating Analyst is responsible for reviewing construction plans and specifications for renovation projects with a primary focus on electrical systems. This role involves performing material and labor takeoffs from 2D architectural and electrical plans, developing accurate cost estimates, and supporting the bid process from initial review through final submission. The position requires proficiency in modern estimating techniques, including the use of AI-powered tools and online resources to ensure competitive and precise pricing.



Core Responsibilities

Electrical Plan Review & Takeoffs

Review 2D construction plans, electrical drawings, and specifications for renovation projects to identify scope of electrical work.

Perform detailed quantity takeoffs for electrical components including wiring, conduit, panels, receptacles, switches, lighting fixtures, and specialty systems.

Identify discrepancies, missing details, or ambiguities in plans and flag them for clarification with project managers or design teams.

Cross-reference architectural, mechanical, and structural plans to ensure complete electrical scope capture.

Cost Estimating — Labor & Material

Develop comprehensive cost estimates for electrical labor and materials based on takeoff quantities and current market pricing.

Apply industry-standard estimating techniques including unit-cost, assembly-based, and parametric estimating methods.

Maintain and update material pricing databases using vendor quotes, supplier catalogs, and online pricing tools.

Calculate labor hours using established productivity rates, adjusting for project-specific conditions such as working hours, site access, and renovation complexity.

Account for overhead, profit margins, contingencies, and escalation factors as directed.

AI Tools & Online Research

Leverage AI-powered estimating tools and platforms to accelerate takeoff and pricing workflows.

Use online resources to research current material costs, labor rates, code requirements, and product specifications.

Stay current with emerging AI and digital tools relevant to construction estimating and recommend adoption where beneficial.

Utilize digital plan viewing and markup software for efficient plan navigation and annotation.

Bid Support & Communication

Support all phases of the bid process including initial scope review, estimate preparation, bid compilation, and submission.

Respond to internal and external inquiries regarding bid status, pricing revisions, scope changes, and estimate clarifications.

Track active bids, deadlines, and revision requests to ensure timely and accurate responses.

Prepare bid comparison summaries and assist with value engineering recommendations when requested.

Coordinate with subcontractors and suppliers to obtain competitive pricing and confirm availability.

Qualifications & Skills

Experience reading and interpreting 2D electrical and architectural construction plans.

Familiarity with electrical systems, components, and installation methods for commercial and residential renovation projects.

Proficiency in construction estimating techniques (unit-cost, assembly-based, parametric).

Working knowledge of electrical codes (NEC) and local building requirements.

Comfort with AI-based tools, digital takeoff software (e.g., Bluebeam, PlanSwift, or equivalent), and spreadsheet applications.

Strong attention to detail with the ability to manage multiple bids and deadlines simultaneously.

Effective written and verbal communication skills for coordinating with project teams, vendors, and clients.

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.

title: Customer Success & Growth Support Manager
description:
Important — Read Before Applying



Please do not apply unless you can follow instructions exactly.



This role requires strong communication, attention to detail, follow-through, and customer-facing professionalism. The application process is part of the evaluation.



If you do not follow the instructions below exactly, your application will be dismissed without review.



This includes:

 • missing the Loom video

 • going over the time limit

 • skipping any required question

 • ignoring the exact submission format

 • unclear spoken English for a customer-facing role

 • lack of availability during US Pacific Time business hours



Then go straight into:



How to Apply



If you want it a little sharper, use this version:



Important — Applications That Do Not Follow Instructions Will Be Dismissed



We are hiring for a role that requires strong communication, organization, follow-through, and professionalism.



Because of that, attention to detail matters from the very first step.



If you do not follow the application instructions exactly, your application will be dismissed without review.



This includes incomplete submissions, missing Loom videos, ignoring the required format, poor communication, or failure to answer every question.



And I’d keep this line instead of the accent wording:



This is a customer-facing role. You must have clear, professional spoken English and be comfortable on calls, voice notes, and video.



That gets you the filter you want without saying it in a risky way.



Best structure is:

 1. warning

 2. exact instructions

 3. automatic disqualification bullets





About Us



We’re a fast-growing founder-led wellness and sustainability brand based in Las Vegas. We’ve built strong traction, loyal customers, and a product people genuinely love.



Now we’re hiring a sharp, highly organized, customer-facing operator to help us drive more revenue, improve retention, and create more opportunities from behind the scenes.



This is not a passive admin role. You will play a direct part in helping the business grow.



The Role



You’ll sit at the intersection of customer success, sales support, outreach, and CRM ownership.



Our local team is out in the market selling, building relationships, and creating 
ntum. Your job is to back that up online by making sure leads are followed up with, customers are taken care of, opportunities keep moving, and nothing slips through the cracks.



You will help create growth through:

 • lead follow-up

 • customer support

 • onboarding

 • partner and affiliate outreach

 • CRM management

 • follow-through and pipeline support



You are not just here to “assist.”

You are here to help turn attention into revenue, customers into long-term fans, and conversations into real opportunities.



What You’ll Own



Lead Follow-Up & Revenue Support

You’ll follow up with warm leads, prospects, and opportunities across text,
, phone, and CRM. You know how to keep conversations moving and help turn interest into action.



Customer Success & Retention

You’ll help customers have a smooth, professional experience from first touch through onboarding and ongoing support. You solve issues quickly and help keep customers engaged.



Partner & Affiliate Outreach

You’ll help source and reach out to affiliates, partners, and aligned collaboration opportunities through online channels. You’ll start conversations, nurture interest, and support next steps.



CRM & Pipeline Management

You’ll keep the CRM clean, current, and reliable. Notes, tasks, follow-ups, and statuses should be tight and easy to trust.



Sales Support & Coordination

You’ll support the founder and sales team by making sure follow-up happens quickly, meetings are supported, next steps are tracked, and 
ntum is maintained.



AI & Workflow Support

You’ll use AI tools and simple systems to improve speed, organization, communication, and execution.



How Performance Is Measured



You will be judged on three things:



1. More Revenue

How well you help move leads, follow-ups, and opportunities toward real sales.



2. Better Retention & Customer Experience

How well you create a smooth customer journey, solve issues, and keep customers engaged and happy.



3. More Opportunities & Cleaner Pipeline

How well you help generate opportunities through outreach and follow-through while keeping the CRM organized and actionable.



Core KPIs may include:

 • follow-up speed and consistency

 • opportunities created

 • meetings booked

 • revenue influenced

 • onboarding quality

 • retention / repeat orders

 • CRM accuracy and pipeline hygiene



Day to Day

 • Following up with warm leads, prospects, and customers

 • Managing customer communication across text,
, phone, and CRM

 • Supporting onboarding and customer success

 • Reaching out to affiliates, partners, and collaboration targets online

 • Keeping the CRM, notes, and follow-up tasks updated

 • Supporting post-meeting follow-up and coordination

 • Helping improve templates, workflows, automations, and internal organization

 • Making sure opportunities keep moving and nothing gets dropped



Who You Are

 • Strong spoken and written English

 • Warm, polished, and professional in communication

 • Highly organized and detail-oriented

 • Strong with follow-up and naturally proactive

 • Comfortable with customer service, sales support, and outreach

 • Confident using CRM systems like GoHighLevel, Close, HubSpot, or similar

 • Comfortable using AI tools to move faster and work smarter

 • Able to manage multiple moving parts without losing track

 • Available full-time during US Pacific Time business hours



Strong Plus If You Have

 • Experience in customer success, executive support, account management, sales support, or business development

 • Experience with lead follow-up and pipeline management

 • Experience with affiliate outreach, online partnerships, or social media outreach

 • Experience in wellness, hospitality, consumer brands, or relationship-driven businesses

 • Experience building workflows, SOPs, automations, or better systems



Compensation



Starting compensation for this role is $1,500–$2,500 USD/month, depending on fit, experience, and capability.



This role also includes performance bonuses and growth upside tied to:

 • revenue support

 • retention

 • outreach results

 • opportunity creation

 • overall business impact



If you help us grow, your compensation and responsibilities can grow with it.



ow to Apply



Please submit:

 1. A Loom video (2 minutes max)



Start by saying:

“My name is [Your Name], I’m in [Your City], and today is [Date] at [Time].”



Then answer these two questions:



 • Tell me about a time you helped create revenue or opportunity through follow-up, outreach, customer communication, or account management. What did you do, and what was the result?



 • This role involves customer success, lead follow-up, outreach, CRM ownership, and sales support. How would you structure your first 30 days to create 
ntum and make sure nothing slips through the cracks?



2. A short paragraph on why you’re a strong fit



3. One sentence:

“The KPI I’d be most excited to own in this role is ______.”





Only complete applications will be reviewed.



What Happens Next



If your application shows strong communication, ownership, organization, and follow-through, the next step will be a Zoom interview and a short paid test project.



We move fast and are looking for someone who can do the same.

title: Full stack
description:
Job Title: Full-Stack Web Developer (Laravel + WordPress/Elementor)

Company: Unisoles

Location: Remote

About the Role:

We are looking for a versatile Full-Stack Developer to maintain and improve our digital ecosystem. You will be responsible for two primary assets:

1. 
: A custom-built web application developed on the Laravel framework that handles our complex customer assessment and order forms.

2. 
: Our main marketing website built on WordPress using the Elementor page builder.

The ideal candidate can switch between writing clean, scalable PHP code for our Laravel backend and making design/content adjustments on our WordPress frontend.

Key Responsibilities:

• Laravel Management: Maintain, troubleshoot, and develop new features for the custom order form. This includes optimizing database queries, improving the UI/UX of the multi-step form, and ensuring secure data handling.

• WordPress & Elementor: Update and manage the main website. You should be able to build new landing pages using Elementor, manage plugins, and ensure the site is fast and mobile-responsive.

• Integrations: Ensure seamless data flow between the Laravel form and WordPress (if applicable), and manage third-party API integrations (e.g., payment gateways, CRM, or shipping tools).

• Performance & Security: Monitor site performance, handle backups, and ensure both platforms are secure against vulnerabilities.

• Bug Fixing: Proactively identify and resolve technical issues across both platforms.

title: Virtual Airbnb Operations Lead (High Execution | Remote Leadership Role)
description:
About The Role



We are hiring a highly driven Virtual Operations Lead to take ownership of daily execution across our fast-growing co-living and short-term rental business.



This is a senior remote leadership role for someone who has a strong bias for action, exceptional execution skills, and a deep sense of ownership.



You will oversee operations across multiple hosting platforms, lead and motivate remote teams, resolve escalations, and ensure that the business runs smoothly every day.



This role comes with significant decision-making authority and clear long-term growth opportunities.



? Work Schedule

Monday to Saturday





8:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST





Sunday off (on call only for very urgent operational issues)







? Compensation

$1,200 USD per month



Perks include additional performance bonus, yearly bonus and annual salary reviews (based on performace and contribution to the team)





Fully remote







? Core Responsibilities

? Multi-Platform Hosting Oversight

Supervise hosting operations across platforms such as Airbnb, Expedia, PadSplit, and other booking channels





Ensure listings are managed properly and operational standards are maintained





Oversee guest experience, occupancy flow, booking extensions, and issue resolution





Monitor platform performance and ensure timely responses to guest and resident concerns







? Team Leadership & Execution

Lead, motivate, and supervise Virtual Assistants and Team Leaders





Drive accountability and ensure tasks are completed to standard





Identify performance gaps and implement improvements





Maintain high team productivity and operational discipline







? Hiring & Team Growth

Participate in recruiting and hiring new Virtual Assistants





Support onboarding and integration of new tea
mbers





Help build a strong and scalable operations team







? Operational Decision Making

Resolve escalations involving guests, residents, payments, maintenance, and logistics





Take initiative to solve problems quickly and effectively





Enforce company policies and operational standards





Escalate only major financial or strategic issues







? Systems & Process Ownership

Monitor workflows and operational boards (e.g., 
)





Ensure accurate tracking of occupancy, collections, maintenance, and cleaning





Recommend and implement process improvements





Drive efficiency and automation where possible







? Financial & Administrative Coordination

Liaise with the company accountant to provide operational clarifications





Assist in resolving payment questions and operational discrepancies





Support accurate reporting and documentation across teams







? What We Are Looking For

We are looking for someone who:

Has strong execution skills and follows through until completion





Has a natural bias for action and does not wait to be chased





Demonstrates a deep sense of ownership and accountability





Is confident managing people and making operational decisions





Thrives in fast-paced environments





Is highly organized and detail-oriented





Communicates clearly and professionally





Is comfortable using technology and managing remote workflows







? Growth Opportunities

This role is part of our leadership pipeline.

High performers will have opportunities to grow into:



Operations Manager





Regional Operations Leader



Strategy or Executive Leadership roles



You will gain real exposure to scaling systems, managing international teams, and building structured operations.



? How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume





A short voice introduction





A written example of a time you took ownership of a challenging situation and drove it to completion



Brutally Honest Role Expectations



This is a leadership role in a fast-moving operations environment.



It is not suitable for someone looking for a relaxed or routine virtual job.



? High Execution Environment



This role requires consistent follow-through.



Issues must be driven to completion.

Tasks cannot be left half done.

You will be expected to move work forward every day without waiting to be reminded.



If you prefer to only execute clearly assigned tasks or wait for detailed instructions before acting, this role may not be a good fit.



? Long Operational Hours



The work schedule is demanding:



Monday to Saturday



8 AM to 8 PM EST



This includes periods of high activity, escalations, and decision making.



You must have the stamina, discipline, and focus required to perform at a high level during long working hours.



? Ownership Mindset Required



You will be trusted with significant responsibility.



You are expected to think beyond your task list and consider:



revenue protection



guest experience



team productivity



operational efficiency



If something is not working, you are expected to take initiative and propose or implement solutions.



This role is not suitable for candidates who prefer to avoid responsibility or escalate every challenge.



? Pressure and Accountability



Operational issues can be time-sensitive and sometimes stressful.



You will need to:



make practical decisions with incomplete information



manage competing priorities



remain calm while leading others



Performance will be measured based on outcomes, not effort alone.



? Leadership Expectations



You will supervise Virtual Assistants and Team Leaders.



This means:



giving direction



enforcing standards



addressing underperformance



motivating the team



You must be comfortable holding others accountable.



? Startup Growth Reality



We are a growing company with evolving systems.



Processes will improve over time, but not everything will be perfect from day one.



You must be adaptable and comfortable working in an environment where improvement and execution happen simultaneously.



? Long-Term Opportunity



This role is designed for candidates who want to grow into senior leadership.



If you are looking for stability, influence, and the opportunity to shape operations at scale, this role can be highly rewarding.



If you are looking for minimal responsibility or predictable routine work, this role may not align with your expectations.



To apply, please complete the form via this link:

title: Senior IT Project Manager
description:
Job Description

The Senior Project Manager is a seasoned professional responsible for leading ITS’s most complex, strategic, or high-risk projects. With a proven track record of managing multi-phase or multi-location engagements, the Senior PM is trusted with clients and initiatives where clear communication, deep technical understanding, and high judgment are critical to success. 



In addition to managing project delivery, the Senior PM supports department improvement by mentoring junior PMs, contributing to best practice documentation, and participating in cross-departmental strategy. 



Job Responsibilities

Project Delivery & Leadership

Own the full lifecycle of high-value or technically complex projects — from scoping and kickoff through deployment and closeout.

Lead project teams across departments, managing communication, execution, and stakeholder alignment.

Serve as the escalation point for client-facing challenges and scope management during delivery.



Client Engagement & Strategy

Build strong relationships with client stakeholders and internal sponsors to align technical execution with business outcomes.

Represent the Project department in client-facing meetings, strategy calls, and executive updates as needed.

Anticipate client needs and proactively identify project opportunities or risks.



Team & Process Development

Mentor and support less experienced PMs through shadowing, knowledge sharing, and peer reviews.

Help maintain and improve project documentation standards, templates, and tool usage (e.g., PPM tools, ConnectWise, ITGlue).

Participate in quarterly process reviews or department-led improvement initiatives. 



What Success Looks Like

Senior PM leads projects that are critical to business success and client satisfaction.

Project delivered with in scope, budget and timeframe.

Scope change is managed effectively through out the life cycle of the project

Escalations are limited or none at all.

Adherence to company standard project methodology



Job Qualifications

Prior experience in a Managed Service Provider (MSP) environment is essential.

10+ years of experience in project management roles, with direct oversight of technical or IT infrastructure projects.

Must have hands-on experience with projects including domain migrations, cybersecurity deployments, wireless and network setups, infrastructure rollouts, new client onboarding, and complex client offboarding initiatives.

Proven success leading multi-phase or cross-departmental engagements with budget, scope, and timeline responsibility.

Strong communication, negotiation, and client-facing skills — especially under pressure or in ambiguous situations.

Fluency with project management tools, Microsoft 365, and documentation tools.

Ability to coordinate across departments and align project execution with client goals.

PMP + or equivalent, ITIL, or Agile/Scrum certifications  



Preferred Experience

Familiarity with service delivery KPIs and resource planning in a project-based services company.



Job Requirements

A home office set up that meets the following:

Computer: A working computer with a minimum of 8GB RAM and one of the following:

Windows 11 with an Intel i5 or i7 (8th generation or newer), or

AMD Ryzen 5 or 7 (2000 series or newer), or

macOS 12 or newer.

Internet: Stable internet connection with at least 5 Mbps download and upload speeds.

Audio Equipment: A quality headset with a noise-cancellation feature for meetings.

Mobile Device: A smartphone capable of installing the Microsoft Authenticator app.

Webcam: An HD webcam for video calls.

A very strong cultural fit the ITS way (Our core values will be discussed during the interview)

Excellent command of the English language both spoken and written

Able to work full time 40 hours a week:  8:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST (Monday to Friday)

Able to pass our online behavior and cognitive assessments.

Able to provide NBI Clearance (for PH applicants).



Compensation

Pay rate starts at Php 133,200/month and vary by experience and location.



Benefits

Comprehensive Health Plans / HMO (Employee & Dependent/s)

Life Insurance

Flexible Benefit Reimbursement (Dental/Vision/Mental Health/Wellness/Government Contributions)

Paid Time Off (starts at 15 days per year)

Maternity/Paternity Leave

Paid US Holiday

Night Shift Bonus

Salary Advancement/Loan

Health & Wellness Program

Company-paid training and certification



Apply Here!

title: Remote Medical Assistant / Virtual Scribe (Primary Care – US Clinic)
description:
Job Overview



We are a busy US-based primary care clinic seeking a reliable and experienced Remote Medical Assistant / Virtual Scribe to support our provider and reduce documentation, inbox, and administrative workload.



This is a high-impact role focused on helping the provider stay efficient during clinic and eliminating after-hours charting. You will assist with real-time documentation, medication refills, inbox management, and patient communication.



We are a team-oriented clinic where all staff support multiple areas — we are looking for someone flexible, proactive, and dependable who can take initiative and help keep the clinic running smoothly.



Key Responsibilities

Provider Support & Documentation (HIGHEST PRIORITY)

Prepare patient charts prior to visits (review history, medications, labs, prior notes)

Pre-build notes for upcoming visits to reduce provider workload

Assist provider during patient visits via telecommunication

Perform real-time charting while the provider is speaking with patients

Complete and finalize notes after visits when needed

Prepare and pend medications, refills, and orders for provider review

Anticipate provider needs and help streamline workflow throughout the day

Medication Refills & Inbox Management (HIGH PRIORITY)

Process medication refill requests using clinic protocols

Review patient charts, labs, and visit history before preparing refills

Queue prescriptions for provider signature

Manage provider inbox (patient messages, lab results, refill requests)

Follow up on pending items and ensure nothing is missed

Patient Communication

Respond to patient messages, calls, and
s in a timely and professional manner

Provide appointment reminders and basic follow-up instructions

Answer basic clinical and administrative questions (non-diagnostic)

Route urgent or complex issues to the provider appropriately

Call patients to communicate lab results and provider recommendations using provider-approved instructions

Scheduling & Calendar Management

Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments

Coordinate provider schedules and ensure efficient patient flow

Medical Records Management

Update and maintain accurate patient records in the EHR

Ensure documentation is complete, organized, and up to date

Assist with chart preparation prior to visits

Clinical Support (Non-diagnostic)

Prepare and send intake forms

Assist with visit documentation and summaries

Enter orders (labs, imaging, referrals) under provider direction

Billing & Insurance Support (Preferred, Not Required)

Verify insurance eligibility

Assist with claims, denials, and basic billing inquiries

Help patients with billing-related questions

Telehealth Coordination

Assist patients with setting up virtual visits

Troubleshoot basic technical issues during telehealth appointments

Compliance & Confidentiality

Follow HIPAA guidelines at all times

Maintain strict patient confidentiality and data security

Team-Based Support

Assist in multiple areas of the clinic as needed

Be flexible and willing to support both clinical and administrative tasks

Work closely with the provider and team to improve efficiency

Requirements

Experience working with a US-based medical practice (REQUIRED)

Experience with medication refills and provider inbox management (REQUIRED)

Experience with medical scribing or real-time documentation (STRONGLY PREFERRED)

Must be comfortable working live with the provider during patient visits

Familiar with EHR systems

Experience with Tebra (Kareo) is strongly preferred

Must be a quick learner and adaptable

Strong English communication (written and verbal)

Detail-oriented, organized, and dependable

Additional Skills (Preferred)

Experience with social media management 
, marketing, patient engagement)

Willingness to assist in multiple roles within the clinic

Hours

US Central Time (clinic hours)

Pay

$4–6/hour depending on experience

Application Instructions



Please include:



Your experience with real-time medical scribing

Your experience handling medication refills and provider inbox

Which EHR systems you have used (especially Tebra/Kareo if applicable)

What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who can take work off the provider’s plate, not just assist. The ideal candidate will help ensure charts are prepared, notes are completed, and inbox/refills are managed efficiently so the provider can focus on patient care.

title: Remote Sales Opener / Appointment Setter for U.S. Tax Company
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based tax resolution and tax preparation company looking for a reliable, professional, and highly motivated Remote Sales Opener / Appointment Setter in the Philippines.



Your main job will be to speak with inbound and outbound leads, qualify them, build trust, and help move them to the next step with our company. You will be the first point of contact, so a strong phone presence and confident English are very important.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Answering incoming calls from leads

Calling back missed calls and following up with leads quickly

Speaking with potential clients about their tax situation

Asking simple qualifying questions

Setting appointments or transferring qualified leads

Sending text messages and follow-up messages to leads

Updating notes in the CRM clearly and accurately

Following up with leads who did not answer or were not ready yet

Helping keep the pipeline organized and active



What We’re Looking For:



Strong spoken and written English

Comfortable talking on the phone with U.S. clients

Friendly, confident, and professional communication style

Sales, appointment setting, or call center experience preferred

Able to follow scripts but still sound natural

Organized and detail-oriented

Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

Able to work during U.S. business hours, preferably Pacific Time

Experience using CRM systems is a plus



This Role Is a Great Fit If You:



Are confident starting conversations with new leads

Know how to build rapport quickly

Can handle objections and keep people engaged

Are consistent with follow-up

Want a long-term role with a growing company



Compensation:

Base pay + performance incentives available for the right person.



To Apply:

Please send:



A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with phone sales, opening, or appointment setting

A voice recording introducing yourself

Your internet speed and computer setup

Your availability in Philippine time

-Clear written English and professional online communication

-Comfortable working with social platforms, Google Workspace, and task tools

-Strong attention to detail and ability to follow systems

-Reliable, responsive, and able to manage time independently

-Willingness to learn and adapt as responsibilities evolve



This is a long-term role with room to grow as Starlight Marketing expands.



If you’re someone who enjoys keeping things organized while supporting social media execution, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Lead Generation & Content Specialist (Meta, Tiktok, Google, etc)
description:
We are a fast-paced transportation and logistics company based in US - looking for a tech-savvy Lead Generation Specialist to completely own our truck driver lead generation pipeline. We move fast, expect results, and want a self-starter with a winner's mentality who loves using technology to solve problems and deliver results.

title: Connected Experience Lead
description:
ATTENTION! PLEASE READ CAREFULLY.



To be considered for this role, you must follow the application instructions at the end of this post. Incomplete applications will not be processed or will be disqualified.



FLOWSTATE IS HIRING



Are you a systems thinker who can turn strategy into execution across CRM?

Do you enjoy building connected customer experiences that actually drive results? Then this could be the perfect role for you.



At Flowstate, we build lifecycle marketing systems that connect data, strategy, and execution. We help brands move from disconnected tools to seamless customer experiences that drive measurable growth.



As we continue to scale, we are looking for a Connected Experience Lead to take ownership of campaign execution and automation across the customer journey.



ABOUT YOU



The ideal candidate is someone who thinks in systems, takes ownership, and executes with precision.



You are highly organised and detail-oriented

You have experience working with platforms like Klaviyo, HubSpot, or Mailchimp

You understand
 marketing data, including engagement and behavioural metrics

You can manage multiple campaigns, deadlines, and stakeholders

You communicate clearly and bring clarity to complex tasks

You are proactive and take ownership of outcomes

You are comfortable troubleshooting and solving problems independently

You care about quality and hold a high standard across your work



ABOUT THE ROLE



As a Connected Experience Lead, you will own the execution of CRM and lifecycle marketing across campaigns and automations.



Build, schedule, and launch campaigns with accurate segmentation, timing, and testing setup

Conduct QA across all campaigns, including subject lines, links, personalisation, and rendering

Develop and maintain flows and automations, including logic, filters, and timing

Manage and maintain lists and segments to ensure data accuracy

Troubleshoot issues across delivery, rendering, and data syncing

Implement tracking using UTM parameters for performance visibility

Build dynamic content based on customer data and behaviour

Test templates and rendering using tools like
 on 

Monitor deliverability and inbox placement

Track performance across engagement and revenue metrics

Prepare weekly, monthly, and quarterly reports with insights and recommendations



HOW YOU WORK

You take ownership and follow through on what you commit to

You think in systems, not just tasks

You communicate clearly and proactively

You focus on outcomes, not just activity

You are always looking to improve and grow



OUR CORE VALUES



Clarity

We communicate in a way that is simple, direct, and easy to act on.



Impact

We focus on work that drives measurable results. Every decision ties back to value.



Ownership

We take responsibility for outcomes and hold a high standard across everything we do.



Respect

We respect our clients, our team, and the customer’s attention. Every interaction matters.



Continuous Growth

We invest in getting better every day, as individuals and as a team.



WHAT YOU’LL GET

Strong team culture focused on performance and growth

Structured onboarding and ongoing training to build your skillset

Competitive salary with opportunities to grow as the company scales



APPLY HERE







Include the phrase “Flowstate” in the “Anything else you want to tell us?” section of the application form.

title: Full Stack Developer — AI Web App
description:
We are building an AI-powered architectural lighting design platform. We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to help design, build, and deploy a web application that combines AI room analysis, photometric calculations, and lighting product recommendations.



Responsibilities:



Build and maintain the React frontend (UI, user flows, design tools)

Develop the Node.js/Express backend and REST APIs

Integrate AI/LLM APIs (Anthropic Claude or similar) for room analysis features

Handle IES photometric file parsing and lighting calculation logic

Deploy and manage the app on Vercel or similar cloud platforms

Work with the founder closely in an agile, fast-moving startup environment



You are a good fit if you:



Have experience with React, Node.js, and REST API development

Are comfortable working with AI APIs and prompt engineering

Can work independently with minimal hand-holding

Have an interest in architecture, interior design, or lighting (bonus, not required)

title: Junior Accountant and Auditor (Remote, Full Time and Permanent)
description:
**Those without accounting degree, PLEASE DO NOT APPLY**

**Fresh grads are welcome!**





KSHK is a group company providing professional services related to Hong Kong companies, such as auditing, accounting, and taxation under Hong Kong law. We seek an ambitious and career-orientated individual who sees the unique opportunity to grow with the company.



Tasks include:



- Mainly assist the audit team in preparing audit work and audit reports

- Some bookkeeping works via Google sheet /Xero/ Quickbooks for different clients' accounts

- Attend to any support issues



Desired Skills / Experience:



- Fresh graduates are welcome!

- Prior experience in external audit is a plus

- Strong writing and speaking of English (communication level)

- Strong can-do positive attitude

- Fast learner

- Working in stable office hours (9 am to 6 pm, Mon to Fri)

- Strong knowledge of Google applications, e.g. Drive, Google sheet, Google docs

- Effective communication, written and verbal, in English

- Team oriented

- ChatGPT user

- Attention to detail



Working condition



- 100% online and remote, no traffic

- Mon - Fri, 9:00 to 6:00pm (HKT), with a 1-hour break.

- You are not alone, working with the stable and friendly Filipino team

- Follow Hong Kong public holidays

- Performance bonus on an annual basis



We're looking for a full time, stable tea
mber and you will need to sign a confidentiality agreement and work exclusively with us.



To apply: Please send your resume link with expected monthly salary (in Php). I will not entertain applications without resume or expected salary.



Thanks!

title: Join Our Team as a Webflow Designer!
description:
Are you a talented Webflow designer looking for a long-term, flexible role with a supportive and strategy-led team? We are seeking a detail-oriented designer to help us build beautiful, high-performing websites for our clients.



This is an ongoing contract role with consistent work for the right person. We value quality and collaboration, and we’re excited to find a partner for the long run.



Why You’ll Enjoy Working With Us



• Clear Direction: We provide clear strategy, copy, and wireframes for every project.

• Defined Scope: Each task and page has a well-defined scope to ensure clarity.

• Flexible Hours: Work on your own schedule. We focus on deadlines, not fixed shifts.

• Respectful Collaboration: We value open communication and feedback, and we don’t believe in last-minute changes without discussion.

• Long-Term Partnership: We’re looking for a long-term collaborator to grow with us.



We care about doing things right and building websites that last. We’re not about rushing to the finish line.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Designing and building websites in Webflow.

• (Optional) Designing in Figma before building in Webflow.

• Using the Client-First style guide for clean and scalable builds. 

• Building out CMS collections in a logical and organised way. 

• Implementing basic SEO best practices during the build.

• Following our provided strategy, copy, and wireframes.

• Tidying up and improving existing Webflow sites as needed.

• Delivering websites that are clean, scalable, and easy for clients to maintain.



Preferred Skills (Please Read Carefully)



Webflow

• Strong experience building websites in Webflow. 

• Confident with the CMS, components, and interactions.

• You build clean sites. No inline styles or messy overrides.



Client-First

• Confident using the Client-First naming convention and structure.

• You know when to reuse vs. extend classes.

• You understand how to use utility and combo classes effectively.



SEO Basics

• You know how to structure headings correctly (H1, H2, H3).

• You can write and implement meta titles and descriptions.

• You know how to add image alt text. 

• You can set up CMS-driven SEO fields.

• You understand basic internal linking.



Your Working Style

• You’re comfortable working independently with clear direction.

• You communicate your progress and flag any issues early. 

• You meet deadlines reliably.

• You’re open to collaboration and feedback.

• We can trust you to manage your time and workflow effectively.



Hours & Rate

• Part-time, ongoing contract. 

• Flexible working hours.

• Work to deadlines, not set shifts.

• Your hourly rate will be based on your experience.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



1. A link to 2–4 live Webflow sites you personally built.

2. At least one example that uses the Client-First style guide.

3. A short explanation of how you approach SEO when building a Webflow site.

4. Your hourly rate.

5. Your weekly availability.



We’re excited to hear from you!

title: Social Media Virtual Assistant - Nomad Cruise
description:
Social Media Virtual Assistant - Nomad Cruise





Join the team behind Nomad Cruise, a floating conference that brings 300+ digital nomads together for community, learning, and adventure across the world's oceans.



About Nomad Cruise

Nomad Cruise is more than an event - it's a global community. We host immersive cruises that combine inspiring talks, workshops, and unforgettable on-shore adventures, creating deep connections between remote professionals from all over the world. Our core values are community, adventure, and inspiration, and everything we do is designed to reflect them.



The Role

We're looking for a Social Media assistant who genuinely enjoys the craft of social media- someone who understands tone, and keeps things consistent. You'll be the voice behind our channels day-to-day, helping us stay active, engaged, and on-brand.

Your work will reach thousands of nomads around the world and directly shape how they experience the Nomad Cruise community online.



What You'll Do



Video & Content Editing

Edit short-form video content (Reels, Stories, clips) and assist with graphics or visual assets — taking raw material from the team and turning it into polished, publish-ready content.



Community Management

Respond to comments, DMs, and mentions across Instagram and other platforms — keeping our community warm, active, and engaged in a tone that feels human and on-brand.



Content Scheduling & Coordination

Help plan and schedule posts using our content calendar, coordinating with the team to keep channels consistent and active.



Caption Writing & Ideation

Write captions, suggest content ideas, and repurpose existing material to keep our feeds fresh and our voice consistent.





The Details:

Based in Manila, Philippines

Part-time, remote

5–15 hours per week

Flexible schedule

Long-term opportunity - with the right fit, we're looking for someone to grow with us



Why You'll Love It



Work with a globally minded, purpose-driven team

Your content reaches nomads and travellers worldwide

Fully remote and flexible schedule

Gain behind-the-scenes insight into a unique international event and community



This Role Is For You If You're…



Based in Manila, Philippines

A natural communicator with a friendly, professional tone

Organised and consistent — you don't let things slip

Experienced with short-form video editing (Reels, CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

Familiar with Instagram,
, and basic scheduling tools

Comfortable working independently and managing your own time

Proactive - you flag issues and bring ideas without being asked



How to Apply

Please complete our short application form to get started. As part of your application, include a media kit or portfolio with examples of your work - edited videos or Reels, accounts you've managed, or content you've created.

We'll also ask you to record a short 1-minute video telling us what excites you about this role. No need for perfection - we just want to get a sense of who you are.



APPLICATION FORM: 



Looking forward to hearing from you,

Emilia 

Project & Partnership Manager, Nomad Cruise

title: Administration Support Specialist
description:
Job Title: Administration Support Specialist



Location: Remote



Job Type: Full-Time



Experience Level: Entry Level to Junior Level - Recent College Graduates May Apply



About Us:

VCS is dedicated to helping veterans navigate the VA claims process with ease and confidence. We are seeking a detail-oriented Administrative Support Specialist to join our growing team. This is an entry to junior level position in regards to work experience and who are looking to make a meaningful impact on US veterans’ lives.



Job Summary:

The Administrative Support Specialist provides direct clerical and administrative assistance to the Claims Coach in support of business operations. The specialist will handle a variety of tasks, including managing communication, organizing client documentation, and ensuring efficient workflow processes.



Key Responsibilities:



•
 & Communication Management:

Review, organize, and annotate the Claims Coach’s
s.

o Respond to low-level
s on behalf of the coach when necessary.



• Phone & Messaging Support:

o Review voi
 and text messages on the coach’s phone line.

o Respond when needed and relay important messages.



• Client Documentation & Organization:

o Organize client documents in the company’s data storage system.

o Ensure documents are properly labeled according to company naming conventions.

o Track submitted client documentation and follow up on missing items.



• File Management & Workflow Support:

o Create and maintain online folders in the company’s data storage system.

o Prepare documents for digital signatures using the company’s e-signature tool.



• Client Interaction & Support:

title: Human resource officer
description:

?

?

?

?

?

?

?



???? Compensation

?

 3. Answer this question:

???? How would you verify that 10 employees actually worked their full shift using proof-based systems?



?



???? Final Note



We are building a high-performance, no-excuses team.

If you are extremely organized, disciplined, and take pride in accountability — this role is for you.

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT (Growth + AI + Marketing) — Concierge Medical Practice
description:
???? Read This First (We Hire Differently)



This is not a “task manager” role.



This is a growth operator role.



If you want a checklist job, this is not for you.

If you want to own outcomes, drive revenue, and build systems using AI + marketing, keep reading.



We run a high-performance concierge medical practice focused on longevity, weight loss, and preventive care. We move fast, test aggressively, and expect results.



???? The Mission



Your job is simple to understand, hard to execute:



Turn attention ? into leads ? into booked patients ? into retained members



You will own the systems that make this happen.



???? What You’ll Own (Outcomes, Not Tasks)

1. Lead Generation & Conversion

Manage inbound leads (calls, texts, forms, DMs)

Build and optimize SMS/email follow-up funnels

Reduce lead drop-off and increase next-day bookings

Track and improve conversion rates weekly

2. CRM Ownership

Fully manage CRM (pipeline, tagging, automation)

Build workflows for:

Lead nurture

No-show recovery

Reactivation campaigns

Keep data clean, organized, and actionable

3. Social Media Growth (Revenue-Focused)

Manage Instagram,
, and short-form video platforms

Coordinate and/or create:

Reels

Educational content

Offer-driven posts

Turn content into appointments, not just views

4. Paid Ads Management (Core Growth Driver)

Own Google Ads (Search, Local, Performance Max)

Keyword strategy (weight loss, concierge medicine, HRT, longevity)

Improve CPC, CTR, and conversion rates

Optimize landing pages + ad copy for conversions

Own Meta Ads 
 & Instagram Ads Manager)

Build and scale campaigns for lead generation

Retargeting + lookalike audiences

Creative testing (hooks, angles, offers)

Weekly reporting on:

Cost per lead

Cost per booked appointment

ROI

5. AI & Automation (Non-Negotiable)

Use tools like:

ChatGPT / Claude / AI agents

Automation tools (Zapier, Make, etc.)

Build systems to:

Automate follow-ups

Improve response speed

Generate content at scale

Assist ad copy + funnel optimization

6. Marketing Execution

Launch and optimize campaigns across channels

Test offers, headlines, and funnels weekly

Align messaging across ads, landing pages, and follow-up systems

???? Success Metrics (How You Win)



You are winning if:



Lead ? booked conversion rate increases

Show rate increases

Cost per lead decreases

Cost per booked appointment decreases

Revenue per lead increases

Paid ads ROI improves consistently

Systems run without constant oversight

???? Who This Is For



You:



Think in systems, not tasks

Are obsessed with efficiency + leverage

Understand paid ads deeply (Google + Meta)

Learn tools quickly (especially AI)

Take ownership without being told

Are comfortable being measured on results

? Who This Is NOT For

You need step-by-step instructions for everything

You avoid metrics or accountability

You’ve never managed paid ads accounts

You’re uncomfortable with fast-paced environments

???? Requirements

Proven experience with:

Google Ads Manager

/Instagram Ads Manager

Experience with CRM systems (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, etc.)

Strong understanding of social media + content strategy

Experience with AI tools (or ability to learn quickly)

Ability to analyze data and optimize campaigns

Excellent communication and organization

???? Growth Opportunity



This role can evolve into:



Head of Growth

Marketing Director

Operations Lead

???? How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Do NOT send a generic resume.



Instead, send:



A short Loom video (2–5 min) explaining:

How you would improve our lead conversion

How you would optimize our Google + Meta ads

Tools you would use (AI + CRM)

Examples of:

Ad accounts you’ve managed (with metrics if possible)

Funnels or automations you’ve built

Your favorite AI tools and how you use them

Final Note



We are building something aggressive, modern, and data-driven.



If you can drive leads, optimize ads, and build systems that scale revenue, this is your role.

Apply ...

title: Senior Paid Media Specialist (Meta & Google Ads)
description:
About Us

We are a growing Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) company dedicated to providing life changing

therapy services for children with autism and their families. Our mission is to

expand our reach and connect with more families who need our support. We are looking for

a highly skilled and strategic Paid Media Specialist to lead our client acquisition efforts

through Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads. If you are a data-driven marketer who

understands the nuances of healthcare advertising and knows how to drive high-intent

leads, we want you on our team.



The Role:

As our Senior Paid Media Specialist, you will take full ownership of our paid advertising

strategy. Your primary goal will be to generate high-quality leads—specifically parents

seeking ABA therapy for their children—while maintaining a strong return on ad spend

(ROAS) and adhering to healthcare advertising compliance. You will not just be an ordertaker;

you will be a strategic partner. We expect you to analyze data, propose new campaign

ideas, and continuously optimize our funnels to ensure we are reaching the right families at

the right time.



What You Will Do:

Your responsibilities will span across campaign strategy, execution, and continuous

optimization. You will design, build, and manage end-to-end Meta Ads and Google Ads

campaigns tailored specifically to the ABA therapy market. This involves conducting deep

keyword research focusing on high-intent search terms (e.g., "ABA therapy near me,"

"autism testing") rather than broad, low-converting terms. On Meta, you will utilize

advanced targeting to reach parents of children with autism based on location, interests,

and life stage.



You will also be responsible for writing compelling, empathetic, and compliant ad copy that

resonates with parents and collaborates with our team to develop engaging visual assets.

Continuously monitoring campaign performance is crucial; you will conduct A/B testing on

ad copy, creatives, and landing pages, adjusting bids and budgets to maximize ROI and

lower Cost Per Acquisition (CPA). Furthermore, you must ensure all campaigns strictly

adhere to Google and Meta’s healthcare advertising policies to prevent account bans or

ad disapprovals. Finally, you will provide weekly and monthly performance reports with

actionable insights and strategic recommendations.



Qualifications and Skills:

To be successful in this role, you must possess a blend of technical expertise and strategic

thinking.



Skill Category Specific Requirements:

Platform Expertise-

Minimum 3+ years of proven experience

managing Meta Ads 
/Instagram) and

Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max)

with substantial budgets.



Industry Experience:

Previous experience running ads in the

healthcare, ABA therapy, or a pediatric space is

highly preferred. You must understand the

strict compliance rules for medical advertising.



Analytics & Tracking:

Proficiency in Google Analytics (GA4), Google

Tag Manager (GTM), and Meta Pixel setup. You

must know how to accurately track conversions

and attribute leads.



Landing Page Optimization:

Understanding of conversion rate optimization

(CRO) principles and experience advising on

landing page improvements.



Strategic Thinking:

You don't just push buttons; you understand

the "why" behind the campaigns and can

develop a comprehensive marketing funnel.



Communication:

You are an empathetic communicator who

understands our target audience and can

reflect that empathy in ad messaging. Flawless

written and spoken English is required.



Work Ethic:

You are proactive, self-motivated, and data-driven,

making decisions based on numbers

rather than guesses.



This is a full-time position (40 hours/week) with some overlap required during US business hours for tea
etings, but otherwise, the schedule is flexible. This role offers a significant opportunity to grow into a leadership position as our marketing department expands, providing a long-term, stable career with a company, making a real

difference in the world.



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)

To ensure you have read this entire post and have the attention to detail we require, please

follow these instructions exactly. Applications that do not follow these instructions will be

automatically rejected.



First, use the subject line: "ABA Paid Media Expert - [Your Favorite Color]".



Second, in your cover letter, provide a brief summary of your experience managing Meta

and Google Ads.



Third, include at least two specific examples (case studies or screenshots with sensitive info

blurred) of successful campaigns you have run, ideally in the healthcare or local service

space. Explain the challenge, the strategy you implemented, and the results.



Finally, briefly explain one common pitfall to avoid when running healthcare ads on Google

or Meta.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Product Research Manager – Amazon
description:
Work Schedule: 8:00 AM – 4PM UK TIME (4:00 PM – 12:00 AM PHT)

Salary: $500 - $800



We’re looking for an experienced Product Research Manager who is responsible for identifying profitable product opportunities for the Amazon marketplace. This role involves conducting market research, analyzing competitors, evaluating trends, and selecting products with strong sales and margin potential.



Responsibilities:

• Conduct product research using tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, etc.

• Identify high-demand, low-competition product opportunities.

• Analyze competitors’ listings, pricing, reviews, and sales performance.

• Evaluate product profitability including costs, fees, and margins.

• Track market trends and seasonal demand.

• Provide product recommendations backed by data and insights.

• Work closely with sourcing, branding, and marketing teams.

• Monitor product performance after launch and suggest improvements.



Requirements:

• 2+years of experience in Amazon product research or e-commerce.

• Strong understanding of Amazon FBA model.

• Experience with Amazon research tools (Helium 10, Jungle Scout, etc.).

• Strong analytical and data interpretation skills.

• Good knowledge of Amazon fees, pricing strategy, and profit calculation.

• Attention to detail and ability to identify winning products.

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Role Summary

We are seeking a remote Sales / Lead Generation Specialist to build and manage a pipeline of public-sector furniture opportunities, primarily SUNY, CUNY, and K–12 public schools, and expand into healthcare accounts. Your core mission is to identify decision-makers, outreach by phone/email, qualify interest, track follow-ups, and hand off qualified leads to a Senior Representative to close.

Key Responsibilities

Call and outreach to schools and public institutions to introduce our furniture solutions and secure project conversations.





Target the correct departments at each institution:



Facilities Department (SUNY / CUNY)



Design & Construction (SUNY / CUNY)



Purchasing / Procurement (SUNY / CUNY / K–12)



Buildings & Grounds (K–12)



Understand and work around the public school budget cycle (June 30 fiscal year end; planning typically in spring).



Build and maintain a contact database (Excel) with:



organization name, department, contact person, phone/email



notes, lead status, and next follow-up date



Prepare contact lists for Mailchimp campaigns (bulk + automated promotional
s).



Qualify opportunities (what they need, timing, budget cycle, delivery window) and route any real lead to the Senior Representative for closing.



Assist with early-stage outreach in healthcare (hospitals, clinics, nursing facilities) by identifying purchasing/facilities contacts and finding who influences furniture/casework decisions.





What You’ll Say (Phone Outreach Positioning)

You’ll introduce us as:

A NYS & NYC Certified Woman-Owned furniture dealership



Approved to work with NYC School Construction Authority (SCA)



Specializing in educational furnishings and representing multiple manufacturers on NYS contract to fit different budgets



You’ll ask how we can support their current or upcoming furniture needs, then set next steps.





Requirements

Excellent spoken and written English



Strong phone confidence: professional, clear, and persistent (without being pushy)



Experience in B2B outreach, lead generation, inside sales, appointment setting, or client communication



Comfortable with spreadsheets (Excel/Google Sheets) and organized follow-up tracking



Experience with Mailchimp or similar
 tools (preferred, not required)



Ability to work US business hours (at least partial overlap preferred)





Compensation 

Base salary;

Lead Generation Bonus: e.g., $50 per qualified lead that schedules/requests follow-up with senior rep

Success Bonus: e.g., 0.8% of furniture sell price for any project won from your lead





What Success Looks Like

Clean, growing database of SUNY/CUNY/K–12 contacts

Consistent weekly outreach activity and follow-up completion

Qualified leads handed off with clear notes, contacts, and timeline

title: Clinical Operations Manager (RN or Clinical Lead Experience Required)
description:
Location: Remote 

Schedule: Full time

Language Requirement: Proficient English (verbal & written) is a MUST

We are seeking a highly skilled Clinical Operations Manager to oversee daily clinic operations, support the physician with advanced clinical tasks, and supervise junior virtual assistants. This role requires RN or Clinical Lead level experience, strong organizational abilities, and excellent communication skills.

This is a leadership position that blends clinical expertise, operational management, and patient-facing responsibilities.

________________________________________

Core Responsibilities

Clinical Operations & Physician Support

•	Review physician notes, medical histories, and clinical documentation

•	Execute physician orders accurately and promptly

•	Order labs, imaging, and diagnostic tests

•	Download, organize, and upload lab results into the EMR

•	Track pending results and follow up with labs or patients

•	Create and maintain accurate patient medication lists

•	Assist with medication related workflows (non prescribing)

•	Coordinate with compounding pharmacies and vendors

•	Ensure all clinical documentation is complete, compliant, and properly categorized

________________________________________

Patient Communication & Care Coordination

•	Communicate with patients via phone,
, and text

•	Provide clear, patient friendly explanations of instructions, preparation steps, and follow ups

•	Manage patient intake, forms, and required documentation

•	Ensure patients feel supported, informed, and guided throughout their care

________________________________________

EMR & Documentation Management

•	Work daily within the clinic’s EMR system

•	Upload, categorize, and maintain patient records

•	Identify missing information and proactively request it

•	Ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance across all documentation

________________________________________

Team Leadership & Oversight

•	Supervise junior virtual assistants and ensure task completion

•	Provide training, guidance, and quality control

•	Maintain accountability across the operations team

•	Ensure all administrative and clinical workflows run smoothly

•	Report daily updates, issues, and progress to clinic leadership

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

•	RN, MD (international), or equivalent medical training

•	Strong understanding of medications, prescriptions, and clinical workflows

•	Experience working with EMRs

•	Excellent written and verbal English

•	Strong organizational and multitasking skills

•	Ability to communicate clearly and compassionately with patients

•	Comfortable working in a fast paced, evolving medical environment

•	Leadership or supervisory experience preferred

•	Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently

________________________________________

Preferred Qualifications

•	Experience with compounding pharmacies

•	Familiarity with hormone therapy, functional medicine, or chronic care management

•	Prior experience in a remote medical support or operations role

•	Experience managing or training administrative teams

________________________________________

title: Junior Animator / Video Editor (Remote – Philippines)
description:
About VocabCartoons



VocabCartoons is a fast-growing EdTech startup creating short, engaging animated videos that help children (ages 8–16) learn English vocabulary through stories, quizzes, and games.



We combine storytelling, animation, and AI tools to make learning fun, memorable, and accessible. Our platform is subscription-based, and we are focused on rapid growth through high-quality content and strong execution.



As an early tea
mber, you will work closely with a small, ambitious team and grow alongside the company.









Role Overview



We are looking for a junior animator / video editor with at least 6 months of experience, good English, and strong attention to detail.



This role focuses mainly on post-production and AI-assisted animation, not complex animation from scratch. You will use tools such as MagicLight AI and ChatGPT to efficiently produce short educational videos.



This role is ideal for someone early in their career who wants:



Stable, long-term work



Clear instructions and structure



Hands-on experience using modern AI tools in production



Compensation



USD $350 per month



Full-time, remote



Preferred minimum commitment: 6 months



30-day trial period









Incentive & Growth Plan



In addition to the base salary:



The Contractor’s monthly base salary will increase by USD $10 for every 1,000 new paying members gained by VocabCartoons.



Salary increases are cumulative and reviewed periodically.



This incentive is designed to reward long-term contribution as the company scales.









Required Experience & Skills



Must-have



Minimum 6 months experience in animation and/or video editing



Good written and spoken English





Comfortable using:



AI tools (MagicLight AI, ChatGPT, etc.)



Basic video editing software (After Effects, Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar)



Ability to follow clear SOPs and instructions



Reliable internet connection and computer







 Nice-to-have (not required)



Experience with children’s or educational content



Basic subtitle timing and formatting experience



Simple motion graphics knowledge







Key Responsibilities





Animation & Video Assembly



Use MagicLight AI to generate animation scenes based on provided scripts



Assemble scenes into complete short videos



Ensure correct scene order and visual consistency



 Subtitles & Text







Use ChatGPT to:



Edit subtitles



Improve grammar and clarity



Ensure age-appropriate language



Sync subtitles accurately with audio





Post-Production



Add background music and simple sound effects



Add titles and on-screen text where required



Balance audio levels



Export videos in correct formats and resolutions







Final Delivery



Deliver clean, ready-to-publish videos



Follow file naming and folder structure



Apply small revisions when requested







What This Role Is NOT



To avoid confusion, this role does not include:



? Complex character design from scratch

? Full story writing or creative direction

? Advanced animation or VFX work



This is an execution-focused role, not a senior creative position.



Performance Expectations



With clear briefs and SOPs, a junior in this role should be able to:



Complete 1–2 short scenes per day, or







Finish one short video per day, depending on complexity



Accuracy and consistency are more important than speed.



Why This Is a Good Opportunity



Stable monthly income



Clear expectations and workflows



Opportunity to grow with a scaling startup



Hands-on experience using AI tools in content production



Predictable incentive-based salary growth
