title: Marketing Virtual Assistant
description:
Role Overview

The Marketing Virtual Assistant (MVA) for an healthcare account will support platform growth by executing outbound outreach, marketing content creation, and digital engagement strategies designed to attract healthcare providers (doctors, mobile medical services) and patients to the account's concierge healthcare platform. This role blends outreach, marketing execution, and creative support, working closely with the account leadership and marketing strategy.



Key Objectives

? Recruit qualified doctors and mobile healthcare providers to join the account's platform

? Increase patient awareness, interest, and sign-ups for concierge services

? Strengthen brand presence across digital channels

? Support lead generation, nurturing, and follow-up workflows



Scope of Responsibilities

1. Provider Outreach &; Recruitment (Doctors &; Mobile Services)

? Research and build targeted lists of:

o Physicians (Primary Care, Specialists)

o Mobile healthcare services (IV therapy, mobile imaging, labs, wound care, home health, etc.)



? Conduct outbound outreach via:

o

o LinkedIn

o Phone (when required)

? Introduce account platform value proposition to providers

? Schedule discovery calls or onboarding meetings for interested providers

? Track outreach activities, responses, and follow-ups in CRM or tracking tools

? Maintain updated provider pipeline and onboarding status



2. Patient Acquisition & Concierge Service Promotion

? Assist in creating and executing campaigns to attract patients to:

o Concierge medicine offerings

o On-demand/mobile healthcare access



? Support patient-facing outreach through:

o
 campaigns

o Social media posts

o Website or landing page content (as assigned)

? Respond to basic inquiries and route qualified leads appropriately

? Support follow-ups with interested patients to encourage sign-ups



3. Marketing Content & Materials Creation

? Create and update marketing collateral, including:

o One-pagers and flyers

o Provider onboarding decks

o Patient-facing brochures

o
 templates and drip campaigns

? Design visual marketing assets using tools such as:

o Canva

o Adobe Express (or similar)

? Ensure branding consistency across all materials

? Customize messaging for:

o Doctors &providers

o Mobile medical services

o Patients & families



4. Social Media Marketing Support

? Design and schedule social media posts to:

o Attract doctors to join the account

o Educate patients on concierge and mobile healthcare benefits

? Platforms may include:

o LinkedIn

o

o Instagram

? Support content ideas such as:

o Provider spotlights

o Platform benefits

o Patient education

o Testimonials and success stories

? Coordinate with marketing lead for approvals and posting schedules



5. CRM, Reporting & Coordination

? Maintain accurate records of:

o Leads contacted

o Follow-ups completed

o Meetings scheduled

o Providers onboarded

? Prepare weekly or bi-weekly reports summarizing:

o Outreach activity

o Engagement metrics

o Lead pipeline status

? Coordinate with internal teams on:

o Messaging updates

o Campaign timelines

o Provider onboarding needs



Tools & Platforms (Preferred)

? CRM (HubSpot, Zoho, or similar)

?
 marketing tools (Mailchimp, Constant Contact, etc.)

? Social media schedulers (Meta Business Suite, Hootsuite, etc.)

? Canva or equivalent design platform

? Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)



Qualifications & Skills

? Experience in marketing support, outreach, or lead generation

? Strong written and verbal communication skills

? Comfortable engaging with healthcare professionals

? Basic understanding of:

o Healthcare marketing

o Concierge medicine or mobile healthcare (preferred)

? Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented

? Ability to follow scripts while adapting messaging naturally

? Creative eye for design and branding



Expected Outcomes & KPIs

? Consistent provider outreach and follow-up activity

? Increased number of:

o Qualified provider leads

o Discovery calls scheduled

o Providers onboarded

? Growth in patient engagement and inquiries

? High-quality, on-brand marketing materials and social posts

? Clear weekly performance and activity reporting

title: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
description:
============================================================

OWN THE CLIMB

We Build AI Agents, Automations & Custom Software



============================================================



FULL-STACK SOFTWARE ENGINEER

Next.js + Supabase + TypeScript

Remote | Full-Time (~40 hrs/week) | Compensation: Highly Competitive, starts at $2500 | Async-First



----



You will build AI agents, AI-powered systems, custom software, and automation platforms for real businesses and see your work in production within days, not months. Our founder codes alongside you daily. Every project is a live client engagement, and we work across dozens of industries.



We use Claude Code as a core engineering tool, structured project templates, and comprehensive development standards. Real autonomy, direct founder access, zero bureaucracy.





============================================================

PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING

============================================================



This role requires a very specific tech stack and a builder mindset. To respect your time, please review these honestly:



x Your primary framework is Angular, Vue, or Laravel

x You have less than 2 years of working experience with Next.js and PostgreSQL

x You have never written raw SQL or designed a PostgreSQL schema

x You need step-by-step instructions to complete a feature

x You are looking for a maintenance, support, or legacy codebase role



If any of those describe you, this is probably not the right fit, and that is okay. If none of them apply, keep reading.





============================================================

WHAT A REAL WEEK LOOKS LIKE

============================================================



MONDAY -- Spin up a new client system using Next.js + Supabase . Define the schema, configure Row Level Security, push to Vercel.



WEDNESDAY -- Integrate the Claude API into an AI matching engine. Write Zod validation for the intake form. Debug an RLS policy leaking data across tenants. Find a hard bug on a client agentic system.



FRIDAY -- Get a portal to production. Real users are logging in. You move to the next build.



This is the pace. Every week. We build real systems end to end, and make a lasting impact. If that excites you, you are in the right place.





============================================================

REQUIREMENTS -- YOU WILL BE TESTED ON THESE

============================================================



These skills are evaluated during the interview process. There are no shortcuts.



[x] TypeScript + Next.js App Router -- server components, server actions, route handlers, middleware (now called proxy)



[x] Supabase / PostgreSQL -- raw SQL, schema design, migrations, Row Level Security policies



[x] Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui -- utility-first styling, Radix UI primitives



[x] Zod -- schema validation on both client and server



[x] Git + GitHub -- clean commits, pull requests, branching



[x] Vercel Deployment -- environment variables, preview deploys, build pipeline



[x] Clear Written English -- documentation, commit messages, async communication



----



STRONG PLUS (candidates with these will be prioritized):



> Python (type hints, scripting, Django migration projects)

> Drizzle ORM (type-safe queries, schema management)

> AI/LLM API experience (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, prompt engineering)

> Stripe integration (checkout, webhooks, subscriptions)

> Playwright + Vitest (E2E and unit testing)

> Cloudflare (DNS, CDN, WAF, Turnstile bot protection)



----



NICE TO HAVE:



PostHog, Sentry, Axiom, Arcjet, Resend + React
, n8n, Framer Motion, MCP servers, Upstash Redis, Firecrawl, HIPAA awareness, SEO fundamentals (JSON-LD, Core Web Vitals)





============================================================

HOW TO APPLY

============================================================



One step. Complete our application form.



APPLY HERE:


/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScdVtF2NUZw8dzNU19H0Sx_LXtDsbUN9QKg_XjcDFdMw-ucTg/viewform



The form takes about 3-5 minutes. You will provide:



> Your name,
, and location

> Your basic hardware and software setup

> Resume or CV (PDF)

> GitHub profile and/or portfolio link

> Your availability and compensation expectations



============================================================

WHAT HAPPENS AFTER YOU APPLY

============================================================



Our process is fast, transparent, and respectful of your time. Most candidates complete the entire process within 7-10 days.



----



STAGE 1: APPLICATION REVIEW (1-3 business days)



We review your form, resume, and GitHub. We respond to every applicant.



----



STAGE 2: SCREENING CALL (20 min video call)



A conversational call with our Chief of Staff Rachele covering your background, working style, availability, and what you are looking for in your next role. Not adversarial, just getting to know each other.



----



STAGE 3: TECHNICAL INTERVIEW WITH FOUNDER (45-60 min video call)



A technical conversation with our founder covering system design, architecture, debugging, and how you approach building software. This is not a whiteboard quiz, but a technical interview. We want to understand how you think, how you solve problems, and how you work. 



----



STAGE 4: DECISION (Within 1-3 Days)



We make fast decisions. You will hear from us within 1-3 days with an offer, next steps, or honest feedback. We provide direct, constructive feedback to every candidate who reaches the technical interview, regardless of outcome.





============================================================

WHY ENGINEERS CHOOSE US

============================================================



CAREER ACCELERATION -- In any given month, you might build an agentic system for a government contractor, or a CRM for a healthcare platform, a lead management enrichment portal for a sales team, an investor intelligence tool for a finance firm, and an automation pipeline for a law office, or an ERP system for a design firm. Our engineers gain more production experience in six months than most developers get in two years at a single-product company.



AI-NATIVE WORKFLOW -- Claude Code, AI-assisted testing, intelligent automation, structured engineering standards. This is how software will be built everywhere in three years. You will learn it now.



REAL AUTONOMY -- You own projects end-to-end. No PMs translating requirements badly, no Jira ticket queues, no 6-month sprint cycles where nothing launches.



FOUNDER ACCESS -- You work directly with the founder, who codes daily. Communication is fast, feedback is direct, decisions happen in minutes.



GROWTH TRAJECTORY -- High-performing engineers take on leadership, shape architecture decisions, and grow compensation as the company scales.





============================================================

COMPENSATION AND LOGISTICS

============================================================



Compensation: $2,500/month is the floor, with significantly higher compensation and growth based on experience and skill

Engagement: Independent contractor (1099 / international equivalent)

Hours: ~40 hours/week, primarily asynchronous

Time Zone: Some overlap with US Eastern Time preferred

Location: Fully remote, open to candidates worldwide

Equipment: You provide your own computer, reliable internet, webcam + mic

Start Date: As soon as possible



We are a growing company building real products for real clients. We pay fairly, the work is meaningful, and engineers who prove themselves are compensated and promoted accordingly.





============================================================



Own The Climb is an equal opportunity employer. We evaluate all candidates based on skills, qualifications, and ability to perform the work.

title: Document Preparation Specialist — U.S. Immigration Consulting (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
We are a U.S.-based immigration consulting firm looking for a full-time Document Preparation Specialist to join our team remotely.



You will be responsible for preparing, formatting, and reviewing English-language legal documents related to U.S. immigration applications (green cards, work visas, etc.). You will work with AI-powered tools that guide you through the process step by step — no prior immigration law knowledge is required.



This is a long-term position with room for growth. You will start with document preparation and may take on additional responsibilities over time, including coordinating with clients, managing document printing and mailing, and supporting other operational tasks.



What you'll do:

• Prepare and format immigration application documents in English using our internal tools

• Review AI-generated drafts for accuracy, grammar, and formatting

• Organize and compile document packages for submission

• Coordinate document printing and mailing when needed

• Follow established workflows and standard operating procedures precisely

• Communicate progress and flag issues to your supervisor



Who we're looking for:



Required:

• Bachelor's degree minimum (Master's or PhD strongly preferred)

• Excellent English reading and writing skills

• Strong attention to detail — accuracy is critical in legal documents

• Comfortable learning and using new software tools, especially AI tools

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

• Available for full-time work (40 hours/week)

• Willing to sign a confidentiality agreement



Strongly Preferred:

• Master's degree or PhD

• Experience with document preparation, editing, proofreading, or legal document processing

• Basic Chinese (Mandarin) reading ability — even beginner level is a plus

• Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)



Important Note: This role involves handling sensitive U.S. immigration documents. We are looking for someone with a clean professional background and strong ethical standards. Candidates with no prior connections to China (no study, work, or extended stay in China) are preferred for compliance and confidentiality reasons.



What we offer:

• Competitive monthly salary: $600 – $900 USD/month (based on qualifications and experience)

• Higher salary for candidates with advanced degrees (Master's/PhD)

• Long-term, stable position — not a one-time project

• Structured workflow with AI tools — you don't need to be an immigration expert

• Room to grow into a broader operational role over time

• Flexible remote work



To Apply: Please send a short message including:

1. Your highest educational degree and field of study

2. Any experience with document preparation, editing, or legal work

3. Do you have any experience using AI tools? If yes, which ones?

4. Do you speak or read any Chinese? (Not required, just a plus)

5. Your expected monthly salary in USD

6. When can you start?



We will respond to qualified applicants within 48 hours.

title: Accountant / Financial Operations Specialist
description:
Job Description:



We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Accountant to support the financial operations of Riverstone Management. This role will focus on transitioning our accounting processes into Rent Manager, managing payroll, preparing financial reports, handling budgeting, and overseeing daily banking and vendor payments. The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, and comfortable working independently in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities:

Accounting & Rent Manager Integration



Transition and organize all accounting functions into Rent Manager.



Maintain accurate financial records, ledgers, and account setups within the system.



Ensure all data is entered, updated, and reconciled properly.



Financial Reporting



Prepare weekly, monthly, and quarterly financial reports.



Track income, expenses, variances, and property-level performance.



Provide management with clear summaries and recommendations.



Payroll Management



Process payroll accurately and on time for all employees.



Maintain payroll records, adjustments, and compliance across multiple properties.



Coordinate with HR regarding new hires, terminations, and pay changes.



Budgeting & Forecasting



Assist in creating and monitoring property and company budgets.



Identify discrepancies and provide explanations or corrective recommendations.



Track ongoing financial performance against budget.



Utilities, Vendors & Payables



Pay utilities, vendor invoices, service providers, and other monthly obligations.



Maintain a vendor payment schedule and ensure timely and accurate disbursements.



Review invoices for errors or duplicates before processing.



Banking & Financial Management



Assist with banking tasks including deposits, transfers, reconciliations, and account monitoring.



Maintain accurate transaction records and maintain communication with financial institutions.



Ensure account accuracy and assist with financial audits when needed.



Required Skills:



Strong accounting and financial management experience



Proficiency with Rent Manager or ability to learn quickly



Ability to create accurate reports and manage payroll



Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills



Strong communication skills and ability to work independently

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Construction Administration Assistant (Experienced)
description:
*PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE THIS EXPERIENCE*



Position: Construction Administration Assistant (Experienced)

Company: Blue Strike Homes



About Blue Strike Homes

Blue Strike Homes is a growing custom home building company based in Perth, Western Australia. We're owner-operated - two directors, two direct site staff, and we take a lot of pride in everything we build and deliver. We're not a corporate machine. We're a tight team that communicates daily, moves fast, and cares deeply about doing the job properly for every single client.



We're at the point in our growth where we need someone to own our admin, inboxes and documentation so our directors can stay focused on clients and construction. That's where you come in.  This is a role for a highly experienced administrator in the Australian Construction Industry hence the salary should meet this requirement. This is a part time role starting with 10 hours a week with the view to increase the hours to fulltime eventually.



About the Role

This is a remote, part-time Virtual Construction Administration Assistant role supporting the General Manager and Builder of a boutique custom home building company. The purpose of this role is to take day-to-day administrative workload off the General Manager and Builder so they can focus on higher-value activities including business growth, marketing, client relationships and systems improvement.



At any given time, Blue Strike Homes manages 2-3 homes under active construction, 2–4 homes in pre-construction, and a steady flow of new enquiries. The business operates across a number of integrated systems including Wunderbuild (project management and scheduling), XERO (accounting), Automation King (CRM), and OneDrive (file management).



The successful candidate will be highly organised, systems-minded, proactive and detail-focused. They will work independently within established processes while also contributing to the ongoing improvement of our systems and procedures.



Key Responsibilities

Inbox Management

Own the daily management of our directors' inboxes - sorting, labelling, responding where appropriate, and ensuring no important
 is ever missed.

Document Filing — Google Drive

Own all document filing across Google Drive, ensuring every project file, quote, invoice and
 attachment is saved correctly in the right job folder, correctly named.

Daily Admin Summary

Send a clear end-of-day update every working day - inbox activity, documents filed, tasks completed, items for director attention, and tomorrow's plan by 4:30 PM AWST. 

Contract Addenda Preparation

Own the preparation of contract addenda - compiling all client selections, inclusions and specifications from plans, quotes and decisions. It must be fully complete and accurate before the director sees it.

New Project Folder Setup

Own the setup and ongoing organisation of all new project folders - ensuring every job follows the correct structure from day one through to completion.

Client Handover Documentation

Own the collection and organisation of all handover documents - certificates, compliance docs, warranties, manuals and final paperwork - fully filed and ready before the handover date.

Wunderbuild Estimate Setup

Own the full setup of estimates in Wunderbuild - uploading plans, entering all client and project information, preparing estimates ready for pricing, converting to jobs, and ensuring all specs are complete with product images attached. 

Wunderbuild Document Control

Own the document management in Wunderbuild by uploading the most current plans, quotes, schedules etc into each job and ensure all documentation is current.

General Administrative Support Where required



Required Skills & Experience

• Previous experience in construction administration with at least 2 years experience.

• Demonstrated experience in a virtual construction administration role.

• Highly organised with strong attention to detail and initiative. 

• Confident working within systems and software – ability to learn new platforms quickly

• Strong written communication skills with a professional, client-ready tone

• Experience with CRM or project management software

• Proficient in Google Drive

• Comfortable working with spreadsheets for data tracking and reporting

• Ability to work independently, manage priorities and meet deadlines without close supervision

• Discreet and professional in handling confidential business and client information



Desirable Experience

• Experience with Wunderbuild or similar construction management software (highly regarded)

• Experience supporting an executive or business owner in a fast-paced small business



Systems & Software

Wunderbuild - Estimating, job costing, scheduling and construction project management

Automation King - CRM pipeline – enquiry tracking and client communication

Google Drive - File storage, job folders and document management

Google Mail - Accounts inbox monitoring, client and supplier communication

Microsoft Excel / Word Spreadsheets, trackers, document preparation



What We Offer

• A flexible, remote working arrangement

• A collaborative and respectful working relationship with a small, dedicated team

• The opportunity to be a genuine contributor to a quality-focused, growing business

• Established systems and processes, with the opportunity to take ownership of your role, use initiative, and proactively identify ways to support and improve how we work

• Work that is varied, meaningful and directly supports a beautifully crafted product



If you are a proactive, detail-focused administrator who takes pride in keeping a business running smoothly, and you are looking for a long-term remote role in a company that values quality in everything it does – we would love to hear from you.



Required to Apply

We receive a high volume of applications. To show you have read this ad in full and pay attention to detail - a skill this role demands - please apply for this job via the link below:

title: AI Image Prompt Specialist
description:
Join a fast-growing platform focusing on AI chat and entertainment experiences. The platform across multiple apps collectively has over 3 million users with more joining each day



Overview



We're looking for someone with hands-on experience generating high-quality, realistic AI images using text-to-image tools. This is a prompting-focused role, not an engineering role. You'll be creating images, videos, and characters daily for our platform, so we need someone who already knows what works and what doesn't when it comes to getting great outputs from generative AI.



What You'll Do



Write and iterate on prompts to generate realistic, high-quality images across styles and use cases

Generate AI videos and character assets for our platform

Work with tools like Nano Banana Pro, z-image, and similar image generation platforms

Develop and maintain a library of proven prompts, styles, and workflows

Collaborate with the team on creative direction and visual output standards

Stay current with new models, tools, and prompting techniques as the space evolves



What We're Looking For



Demonstrated experience prompting AI image generators (share your portfolio or examples)

Strong understanding of what makes AI-generated images look realistic vs. artificial

Familiarity with prompt structure, negative prompts, style references, seed management, and parameter tuning

An eye for detail, especially around common AI artifacts (hands, faces, lighting, anatomy)

Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal oversight



Nice to Have



Experience with advanced workflows like ComfyUI, A1111, or similar node-based/local setups

Background in AI video generation tools

Understanding of LoRAs, ControlNet, in-painting, or image-to-image techniques

Photography or digital art background that informs your prompting instincts



This role is not a software engineering position, graphic design role (though design sense helps) or a theoretical role. We need someone who has actually generated thousands of images and knows the craft.

nectar.ai

title: Short-Form Instagram Video Editor
description:
**Short-Form Instagram Video Editor**



---



**About Us**



We run a fast-growing Instagram content operation based in Thailand. The account focuses on high-energy, fast-paced short-form content — think This vs That comparisons, rankings, and listing-style reels. We publish consistently and we are scaling.



This is a real workload for someone who wants steady, ongoing remote work.



---



**Compensation**



$10–$15 per video depending on complexity and quality.



After 30 days of consistent output, you move to a monthly retainer.



There is no cap on volume. If you are fast and reliable, you will always have work.



---



**Schedule and Availability**



30 to 60 videos per month minimum.

Communication happens during Philippine business hours.

You set your own editing schedule — what matters is turnaround time and output quality.



---



**What You Will Own**



**Fast-Paced Reel Editing**

Edit short-form Instagram reels in a style that matches our existing content. Reference videos will be provided. You match the energy, pacing, and format.



**Clip Management**

Pull raw clips from a shared Google Drive folder, edit, and return the final file via Drive link. Simple and clean handoff every time.



**Quality and Consistency**

Every video you deliver should look like it belongs on the account. No rough cuts, no sloppy exports, no guesswork.



**Volume and Reliability**

We need someone who can handle 30 to 60 videos per month without chasing. If you commit to a deadline, you hit it.



---



**You Are a Fit If**



- You have edited fast-paced Instagram reels before and can prove it

- You can match a reference style quickly without heavy back and forth

- You work independently and manage your own output

- You are comfortable editing 30 to 60 short videos per month

- You are available to communicate during Philippine hours

- You tell us exactly what software you use



---



**To Apply**



We do not accept applications without a test edit. No exceptions.



You will be editing three types of videos. Study these examples before you apply:



- **This vs That** — 

- **Listing** — 

- **Ranking** — 



To apply, you must complete all three steps:



1. **Edit one video** using the clips in this Google Drive folder: 

Choose any one of the three formats above and match it as closely as possible.

Send back your completed edit as a Google Drive link.



2. **Send your portfolio** — link to 3 to 5 past reels or a page showing your editing work



3. **Answer these three questions:**

   - What editing software do you use?

   - How many short-form videos have you edited in the last 30 days?

   - What is your average turnaround time per video?



Applications without a test edit will not be reviewed.

title: AI-Driven Paid Media Manager Wanted! Scale Meta & LinkedIn Ads for Fast-Growing Brands
description:
We are looking for a Paid Media Manager to oversee advertising strategy and execution across multiple brands.



This role is responsible for the full lifecycle of paid campaigns — strategy, implementation, optimization, reporting, and scaling. You will primarily manage campaigns on Meta 
/Instagram) and LinkedIn, while experience with other platforms such as Google Ads, TikTok, and YouTube is a plus.



A key part of this role is leveraging AI tools to improve advertising performance. This includes using AI for audience research, ad creative development, copy generation, testing strategies, and campaign analysis.



You will collaborate closely with our creative team to develop high-performing ad creatives and with our social media manager to adapt successful organic content into paid advertising campaigns.



You will be managing campaigns across multiple brands, so strong organization and data-driven decision making are essential.



To apply for this role please use 9 apply points.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



• Develop paid media strategies for multiple brands

• Launch and manage campaigns on Meta and LinkedIn Ads

• Allocate budgets and manage spend across campaigns

• Optimize campaigns for conversions, CPL, ROAS, and other performance metrics

• Analyze campaign performance and generate insights

• Build and maintain clear performance reporting dashboards

• Use AI tools to assist with research, copywriting, creative testing, and optimization

• Work with the creative team to produce high-performing ad creatives

• Collaborate with the social media manager to scale successful organic content into paid campaigns

• Continuously run A/B tests on audiences, messaging, creatives, and landing pages



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



• Proven experience managing Meta Ads campaigns

• Experience running LinkedIn Ads campaigns

• Strong analytical skills and ability to optimize campaigns based on data

• Experience managing campaigns across multiple brands or clients

• Experience using AI tools to improve marketing performance



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE



• Google Ads

• TikTok Ads

• YouTube Ads

• Conversion tracking and attribution

• AI tools such as ChatGPT, Midjourney, Claude, or similar tools for marketing workflows



IDEAL CANDIDATE



• Data-driven and analytical

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable managing campaigns across multiple brands

• Experienced with AI tools and modern marketing workflows

• Proactive and able to independently improve campaign performance
